title: First Statistical Study of Over 100 Magnified Stellar Events at Redshift $z \approx 0.725$ with JWST
toc_summary: Statistical study of 100+ lensed stars at z~0.7
background_knowledge: 强引力透镜效应是宇宙中天然的巨大“望远镜”。当遥远星系（源）恰好位于前景大质量星系团（透镜）的“临界曲线”附近时，背景星系的光线会被极度扭曲和放大，形成多个像，甚至出现巨型光弧。在某些特殊位置上，星系团内部的恒星（微透镜）会进一步产生额外的微引力透镜效应，使背景星系中的个别恒星获得极高的放大倍率，亮度在短时间内（数天至数月）剧增，成为可探测的暂现事件。这些事件被称为“微引力透镜导致的恒星瞬变”。它们为天文学家提供了直接观察高红移（早期宇宙）恒星族群的窗口，帮助研究恒星形成历史、初始质量函数等，同时也可以用来探测暗物质的性质（如波动暗物质模型会预言微透镜事件的奇偶不对称性），以及反推星系团的物质分布和微透镜质量面密度。过去这类事件非常稀少，直到近几年韦布空间望远镜（JWST）的投入使用才开启了统计研究的新时代。著名的“天龙弧”（Dragon arc）是其中的佼佼者，它位于星系团 Abell 370 后方，红移约0.725，因其临界曲线附近的高放大率而成为探测高红移恒星的理想场所。
contribution:
本文利用 JWST 在2022至2024年三个观测周期对天龙弧的多历元成像数据，首次系统性地识别出超过100个由临界曲线穿越引起的恒星级放大事件。这一样本规模远超之前的纪录（同一星系团此前仅有44例），使得研究者能够对高红移恒星群体进行初步统计分析。主要发现包括：
- 通过恒星事件的空间分布，限制了大质量端恒星光度函数的幂律斜率，得到 β = 2.18^{+0.20}_{-0.30}。
- 假设一个固定的光度函数斜率，反推出微透镜天体的面质量密度。
- 检验了微透镜事件的奇偶不对称性，发现该信号依然存在，这一特征曾被提议作为波动暗物质的观测探针。
- 利用事件分布定位了系统中放大率最高的区域，提供了一种独立描绘临界曲线的新方法。
summary: Highly magnified stars at cosmological distances ($z \gtrsim 0.7$) become detectable thanks to microlensing by intracluster stars near the critical curves of galaxy clusters. Multi-epoch photometric campaigns targeting caustic crossing galaxies magnified by massive galaxy clusters enable the detection of these objects as transient events. Such stars provide unique opportunities to study stellar populations at early cosmic times, probe the nature of dark matter, reveal small-scale structure in the cluster, and improve lens models. To date, only a few dozen high-redshift stars have been reported, with a single lensed galaxy, the Dragon, holding the current record of 44 detections. These numbers, however, remain insufficient to exploit their full potential. In this paper, owing to the inclusion of new observations, we report the identification of more than 100 magnified stellar events in the Dragon, behind the massive galaxy cluster Abell 370. The relatively low redshift of the Dragon ($z\approx0.725$) facilitates the detection of its most massive stars. Using imaging data from three different cycles (2022--2024) with the James Webb Space Telescope, we apply a time-domain technique to identify flux variations associated with caustic-crossing events. From the spatial distribution of stellar events we constrain the high-end slope of the stellar luminosity function, finding $β=2.18^{+0.20}_{-0.30}$. Alternatively, assuming a fixed slope, we constrain the microlens surface mass density. In addition, we examine the parity asymmetry of the detected caustic-crossing events, a proposed probe of wave dark matter, and find that it remains present. We also use the events to trace the regions of highest magnification, offering an alternative way to map the system critical curves.

title: The Sound of the Universe: A Resonant Gravitational Instability Driven by Baryon-Dark Matter Relative Drift
toc_summary: Resonant instability from baryon-dark matter drift
background_knowledge: 在宇宙学中，物质成分主要包括暗物质和重子物质。在早期宇宙，光子和重子物质紧密耦合，而暗物质仅通过引力相互作用。当宇宙温度降至约3000K时，质子和电子复合成中性氢，光子与重子物质解耦（即“复合”时期）。此后，重子物质与暗物质之间由于此前不同的动力学历史，会产生一个相对运动速度。重子物质因带有热压力，存在一个金斯尺度（Jeans scale）：在小于该尺度的扰动上，压力能够抵抗引力塌缩，因此重子物质是稳定的；而冷暗物质（CDM）是无碰撞的，在所有尺度上都不稳定。这种相对速度的引入，改变了传统的结构形成图像——它可能抑制小尺度上的重子物质聚集，但也可能通过新的不稳定性机制导致增长。本研究的核心是揭示一种共振引力不稳定性：当重子物质与暗物质的相对漂移速度处于亚音速区间时，暗物质的扰动模式经多普勒频移后与重子物质的声波分支发生共振，从而产生指数放大的密度扰动，其增长率甚至超过纯暗物质的内在增长率。这一机制为理解从行星尺度到星系团尺度的多种天体物理现象提供了新视角。
contribution: 本文首次证明，在早期宇宙解耦后，暗物质与重子物质之间的相对漂移速度会触发一种共振引力不稳定性，从而驱动重子物质中的声波。研究发现：当投影的暗物质漂移速度（相对于扰动波矢方向）为亚音速时，重子物质的稳定振荡分支会与多普勒频移后的暗物质模式发生共振，产生指数增长的密度扰动，其增长率超过暗物质本身的固有增长率。这种不稳定性在低于重子金斯尺度的区域最为显著；在重子主导的环境中，会在金斯尺度和共振尺度之间打开一个完全稳定的窗口。超音速漂移则会抑制增长，这与已有认知一致。共振耦合还导致两种物质成分之间的动量转移，产生一种非粘性、无碰撞的拖曳效应。作者推导了共振增长率的精确解析近似，并指出相应的时间尺度在不同天体物理环境中（包括行星、原行星盘、恒星、分子云、星系和星系团）从几年到数千万年不等，通常远小于这些系统的年龄。在膨胀的FLRW宇宙中，该不稳定性会在不同红移处对取向合适的扰动模式增强重子密度起伏，同时抑制与暗物质流方向一致的模式。因此，宇宙在各种尺度上“歌唱”，这一共振机制提供了“聆听”的手段：它通过暗物质在天体物理对象上留下的“地震”印记来提供一种全新的探测暗物质的方法，并可能解释长期存在的难题，如旋臂的持久性和星系团内介质的加热。
summary: Dark matter and baryons acquire a relative velocity after decoupling in the early Universe. Baryons are gravitationally unstable only above their Jeans scale, while cold dark matter (CDM) is unstable on all scales. We show for the first time that their relative drift triggers a resonant gravitational instability that drives sound waves in baryons. When the projected DM drift is subsonic, the stable oscillatory branch of baryons resonates with the Doppler-shifted DM mode, producing exponentially growing perturbations whose growth rates exceed the intrinsic CDM growth rate. The instability peaks below the baryon Jeans scale and, in baryon-dominated environments, opens a window of complete stability between the Jeans scale and the resonance. Supersonic drift suppresses growth, as previously noted. The resonant coupling also transfers momentum between the species, creating a non-viscous, collisionless drag. We derive an accurate analytical approximation for the growth rate at resonance and show that the associated timescales range from years to tens of millions of years across diverse environments -- planets, protoplanetary disks, stars, molecular clouds, galaxies, and galaxy clusters -- typically much shorter than their ages. In an expanding FLRW universe, the instability enhances baryon density perturbations at different redshifts for appropriately oriented modes while suppressing the growth of those aligned with the DM stream. The universe thus sings across all scales, and this resonant mechanism provides the means to listen: it offers a novel probe of dark matter through its seismic imprint on astrophysical objects and may explain long-standing puzzles such as the persistence of spiral arms and the heating of the intracluster medium in galaxy clusters.

title: Variability of Sagittarius A* at 3 GHz on minute-scale with MeerKAT
toc_summary: Short-term radio variability of Sgr A* at 3 GHz
background_knowledge: 人马座 A* (Sagittarius A*, 简称 Sgr A*) 是位于银河系中心的超大质量黑洞，质量约为 4 × 10^6 M⊙，属于低光度活动星系核 (AGN)。其射电辐射一般认为源自黑洞附近致密区域的同步辐射，可能来自磁化的吸积流或喷流。Sgr A* 在全电磁波段均表现出显著的光变，尤其在毫米/亚毫米波段，分钟到小时量级的快速光变已被广泛研究，为事件视界望远镜 (EHT) 等观测所揭示。然而，在低于约 5 GHz 的低频射电波段，短于一天的光变特征长期缺乏高时间分辨率的系统探索。这是因为低频辐射可能受星际闪烁和散射影响更大，且谱能量分布 (SED) 在厘米波段可能由不同辐射成分主导。理解不同频率下光变的关联，对于限制 Sgr A* 的辐射区域结构、吸积物理及能量释放机制至关重要。近年来，新一代射电望远镜如 MeerKAT 的灵敏度和高时间分辨率，为填补这一低频快速光变观测空白提供了机遇。
contribution: 本研究利用 MeerKAT 望远镜对 Sgr A* 在 2.79 GHz 进行了约 8 小时的连续观测，首次在分钟级时间尺度 (1 分钟采样) 上系统分析了其流量变化。通过 UV 平面上的点源模型拟合，获得了光变曲线。结果表明，Sgr A* 在几十分钟的时间尺度上存在显著流量起伏，调制指数为 6.11%，平均流量密度为 (827 ± 0.1 (统计) ± 33 (系统)) mJy，平均频谱斜率为 0.08 ± 0.03。此外，测得结构函数的斜率为 0.81 ± 0.05，特征光变时间尺度约为 120 分钟。这些发现暗示，厘米波段和毫米波段的光变很可能具有比以往所认为的更为紧密的物理关联。该低频观测为限制 Sgr A* 射电辐射的物理机制及其谱能量分布提供了关键约束。
summary: The supermassive black hole Sagittarius A* (Sgr A*) exhibits temporal and spectral variability across the electromagnetic spectrum. However, variability at radio frequencies below ~ 5 GHz for timescales shorter than a day remains largely unexplored. We investigate the variability of Sgr A* at 2.79 GHz on short timescales (1 min), to probe an under-explored regime of its emission process. Through point-source model fitting in the uv-domain, we analyse the flux density variation of Sgr A* over an 8 h observation. We detect flux variation on a few tens of minute timescale with a modulation index of 6.11 %, a mean flux density of ($827 \pm 0.1_{\mathrm{stat}} \pm 33_{\mathrm{sys}}) \, \mathrm{mJy}$, and a mean spectral slope of $0.08\pm0.03$. Furthermore, we measure the slope of the structure function of the observed light curve as $0.81 \pm 0.05$ with a characteristic timescale of about 120 min. Our study at low radio frequencies is a critical step toward constraining the physical mechanisms that drive Sgr A*'s variable emission and its spectral energy distribution. Our study suggests that variability at centimetre and millimetre wavelengths is likely more closely related than previously thought.

title: MUSE-DARK III: The evolution of the radial acceleration relation at intermediate redshifts
toc_summary: RAR evolution at intermediate redshifts
background_knowledge: 径向加速度关系（Radial Acceleration Relation，RAR）是星系动力学中一个引人注目的经验规律：它描述了星系盘上不同位置处，由旋转曲线推算的总径向加速度（a_tot）与重子物质贡献的径向加速度（a_bar）之间紧密的单一关系。在局域宇宙中，这一关系在低加速度端（低于特征尺度 a0 ≈ 1.2 × 10⁻¹⁰ m/s²）明显偏离 1:1 直线，意味着星系外围存在未被重子物质解释的“质量缺失”，通常归因于暗物质晕。RAR 最早由 McGaugh 等人在斯皮策测光与高精度 H I 旋转曲线样本中发现，其极小的内禀弥散（～0.1 dex）暗示重子与暗物质之间存在极为规则的耦合。这一发现既可以被标准冷暗物质（ΛCDM）框架下的恒星-暗晕质量关系及晕内物质分布所重现，也被视为修正牛顿动力学（MOND）的自然预言，因此成为检验引力理论的关键观测基石。然而，迄今为止绝大多数 RAR 研究局限于近邻星系，对其在高红移宇宙中的表现知之甚少。随着积分场光谱（IFS）技术的发展，例如 MUSE 对哈勃超深场（HUDF）的深度观测，我们得以首次将这一关系推向宇宙学尺度，探究其随时间的演化。这为理解星系形成中重子反馈、暗晕结构增长以及可能的动力学规律普适性开辟了新窗口。
contribution:
本研究利用 MUSE 哈勃超深场巡天（MUSE HUDF）的高信噪比数据，构建了 79 个恒星质量完备（M* > 10^8.8 M☉）、红移范围 0.33 < z < 1.44 的恒星形成星系样本。通过三维前向建模，我们对每个星系进行了盘-晕分解，同时考虑恒星、气体、暗物质成分及压强支持修正，从中提取内禀总加速度（a_tot）和重子加速度（a_bar）。主要发现包括：
- 在这一中等红移样本中，RAR 依然存在，但整体关系相对于局域关系发生偏移：特征加速度尺度升高为 a0(z∼1) = (2.38 ± 0.1) × 10⁻¹⁰ m/s²，本征弥散增大至约 0.17 dex。
- 将样本按红移细分并分别拟合 RAR 后发现，特征加速度 a0 随着红移升高而系统性增大。参数化 a0(z) = a0(0) + a1 × z，得到 a1 = (1.59 ± 0.1) × 10⁻¹⁰ m/s²，提供了 RAR 随时间演化的统计显著证据。
- 采用不同暗物质晕密度轮廓（如 NFW、伪等温晕）以及 MOND 框架重复分析，均得到一致结果，表明这一演化不依赖于具体模型假设。
该工作表明，RAR 在宇宙正午前后依然成立，但其特征加速度随红移升高，暗示着重子物质与“缺失质量”之间的关联可能随着宇宙时演化，为理解星系-暗晕共演化及基础物理规律提供了重要观测约束。
summary: The radial acceleration relation (RAR) is a tight empirical correlation between the observed radial acceleration (a_tot) and the baryonic radial acceleration (a_bar) measured across galaxy radii: these two accelerations start to deviate significantly from each other below a characteristic acceleration scale, a0. So far, observational studies of the RAR have predominantly focused on galaxies in the local Universe, leaving its evolution with cosmic time largely unexplored. Using high signal-to-noise data from the MUSE Hubble Ultra Deep Field survey, we investigate the RAR with a sample of 79 star-forming galaxies (complete above M* >10^8.8 Msun) at intermediate redshifts (0.33 <z <1.44). We estimate the observed intrinsic acceleration and the baryonic acceleration from a disk-halo decomposition that incorporates stellar, gas, and dark matter components, with corrections for pressure support, using 3D forward modelling. We find a RAR in our intermediate-z sample offset from the local relation, with a higher characteristic acceleration scale, a0(z~1) = 2.38+/-0.1* 10^-10 m/s^2, and a larger intrinsic scatter (~0.17 dex). Dividing the sample into redshift bins and refitting the RAR in each bin, we find a characteristic acceleration scale that systematically increases with z. Parametrizing the z-dependence as a0(z)= a0(0) + a1 * z, we obtain a1 = 1.59+/-0.1 *10^-10 m/s^2, providing evidence for a z-evolution. We find similar results using various dark matter halo profiles as well as the Modified Newtonian Dynamics framework in our 3D forward modelling. Our results show that the RAR persists at intermediate redshift, with statistically significant redshift evolution of the characteristic acceleration, pointing to a possible evolution of the baryon-missing mass connection over cosmic time.

title: A homogeneous three-dimensional view of Molecular Cloud kinematics out to 2.5 kpc. Using Young Stellar Objects and Open Clusters as complementary tracers
toc_summary: 3D cloud motions traced by young stars
background_knowledge: 分子云是银河系中恒星诞生的摇篮，其运动学特征直接反映了恒星形成过程的初始条件，也为研究银河系结构演化提供了重要线索。传统上，分子云的运动主要借助气体探针（如 CO 及其同位素分子谱线）进行观测，但气体容易受到化学演化、耗散和非热运动的影响，难以精确追踪引力主导的大尺度运动。随着 Gaia 卫星释放高精度天体测量数据，年轻恒星（尤其是年轻星天体和年轻疏散星团）作为“化石”探针，因其年龄轻、与母云运动关联度高等优势，逐渐成为重建分子云三维运动的重要工具。这类方法的核心假设是，年轻星体在脱离气体云后，其整体运动仍保留母云的动力学印记，从而允许通过测量恒星的六维相空间信息反推分子云的大尺度运动状态。结合精确的视向速度和轨道积分，研究者能够构建云团的全面运动学图像，并追溯其演化历史。当前，利用 Gaia 数据研究分子云运动已成为恒星形成领域的前沿方向，但不同恒星探针之间的一致性、以及探针与气体运动学之间的系统差异仍需要进一步验证。
contribution: 本文基于 Gaia DR3 天体测量数据和补充的视向速度巡天，构建了一个包含 24,732 颗年轻恒星示踪天体的统一样本。通过自行空间中的稳健聚类，识别出同运动的年轻星天体（YSO），并利用蒙特卡洛采样导出了云团平均运动。然后，将结果与年龄小于 30 Myr 的疏散星团运动学进行对比。研究发现，YSO 与疏散星团在三维运动学上高度一致，空间速度偏差中位数仅为约 2 km/s，证实两者都能可靠追踪母分子云的体运动。据此，获得了太阳周围 2.5 kpc 内 15 个主要分子云复合体的均一三维运动学，其相对银河系旋转的残余速度中位数约为 8.7 km/s。通过轨道积分，回溯了太阳系穿越猎户座云团的旅程，并揭示了豺狼座、蛇夫座和南冕座云团在 Sco-Cen 星协中的共同起源。内部运动分析表明，猎户座和蛇夫座云中存在显著的膨胀（5σ 置信度），并且在至少 7 个云复合体中探测到了相干旋转。
summary: Understanding the large-scale dynamics of molecular clouds (MCs) is crucial for constraining the processes that govern star formation and the structure and evolution of the Galaxy. While gas tracers have traditionally been used to map MC kinematics, stellar tracers such as young stellar objects (YSOs) and open clusters (OCs) provide a complementary approach that enables direct comparisons between the stellar and gaseous components. We aim to validate OCs as complementary tracers by testing whether they retain the same bulk kinematic imprint as YSOs, and to reconstruct the three-dimensional (3D) motions of the main MC complexes within 2.5 kpc of the Sun using YSOs and young OCs as tracers. Using Gaia DR3 astrometry together with complementary spectroscopic surveys for radial velocities, we compiled a unified sample of 24,732 stellar tracers. We applied robust clustering in proper motion space to identify co-moving YSOs and derived cloud-averaged motions via Monte Carlo sampling. These were compared with the kinematics of OCs younger than 30 Myr. Finally, we performed orbital integrations in a realistic Galactic potential to trace the past evolution of the clouds and quantify their expansion and rotation. We derive homogeneous 3D kinematics for 15 MC complexes within 2.5 kpc. YSOs and OCs exhibit strongly consistent kinematics, with a median spatial velocity offset of $\simeq 2$ km s$^{-1}$, confirming that both populations trace the bulk motion of their parent clouds. The resulting cloud kinematics show a median peculiar velocity of $\simeq 8.7$ km s$^{-1}$ with respect to Galactic rotation. We trace back the Solar System's voyage through the Orion cloud and the common origin of Lupus, Ophiuchus, and Corona Australis in Sco-Cen. Internally, we detect significant expansion in Orion and Ophiuchus ($5σ$) and coherent rotation in at least seven complexes.

title: A Quasar--Companion System Without AGN Outflow at $z \sim 6$: The Case of PSO J083+11
toc_summary: No AGN outflow in z~6 quasar companion system
background_knowledge:
宇宙再电离时期（Epoch of Reionization, EoR）是宇宙大爆炸后约4亿年至10亿年间的重要阶段，第一代发光天体产生的紫外光子逐渐电离中性氢，终结了宇宙“黑暗时代”。类星体作为该时期最明亮的活动星系核（AGN），其宿主星系与中心超大质量黑洞（SMBH）的快速成长和反馈过程是理解星系形成与演化的关键。AGN反馈常表现为驱动高速气体外流，将物质和能量注入星系际介质（IGM）和星系周介质（CGM），从而调节恒星形成与黑洞吸积。观测上，冷星际介质中的 [CII] 158μm 精细结构线是重要的冷却通道和气体示踪剂，而远红外（FIR）连续谱则来自尘埃再辐射的恒星形成或AGN加热。典型恒星形成星系遵循一定的 [CII] 光度与总红外光度之比（$L_{[CII]}/L_{\rm FIR}$），当该比值显著偏低时，即“[CII] 亏损”，可能暗示AGN或其他高强度辐射场对星际介质的剧烈影响。在高红移类星体中，普遍预期存在强大的AGN驱动物质外流，但少数系统并未呈现明显外流特征，这为研究黑洞吸积与反馈的早期阶段提供了珍贵窗口。

- 研究对象：PSO J083.8371+11.8482，一个红移 z=6.34 的类星体及其伴星系，位于宇宙再电离时期。
- 观测手段：利用阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）观测 [CII] 158μm 发射线和远红外连续谱。
- 核心科学目标：检验AGN活动是否通过外流影响了伴星系及周围CGM。
contribution:
本文利用ALMA数据对PSO J083+11系统中的类星体宿主与伴星系进行了详细的多相气体和尘埃分析。

- 恒星形成率测量：类星体宿主从 [CII] 估算的恒星形成率（SFR）为 544–3764 $\rm M_\odot\,yr^{-1}$，从远红外估算的SFR为 1861–2932 $\rm M_\odot\,yr^{-1}$；伴星系的对应SFR较低，分别为 21–145 和 76–211 $\rm M_\odot\,yr^{-1}$。
- 星际介质主导能源：两个星系均遵循典型恒星形成星系的 $L_{[CII]}/L_{\rm FIR}$ 比值，未发现 [CII] 亏损，表明星际介质加热以恒星辐射为主，而非AGN。
- 气体动力学特征：[CII] 矩图显示两者均具有紧凑且中心集聚的发射，速度场呈现有序旋转模式。速度弥散远低于AGN驱动强外流对应的典型值，未检测到明显的形态不对称或扰动速度场，排除了重大并合或强反馈的迹象。仅在类星体的高速通道中发现了边沿性运动学次结构，需进一步观测确认。
- 环境与伴星系位置：伴星系位于类星体投影距离约 18.25±0.28 kpc 处，处于类星体的邻近区域（proximity zone）内，但无论形态还是运动学均无AGN外流影响CGM的痕迹。
- 物理解释：该系统处于AGN外流形成之前的吸积阶段，即超大质量黑洞正在快速增长，但尚未驱动大规模气体外流，为理解AGN反馈的早期触发提供了直接观测证据。
summary: PSO J083.8371+11.8482, a quasar at $z = 6.34$ with a nearby companion galaxy, provides an opportunity to study the impact of active galactic nucleus (AGN) activity on the surrounding environment during the epoch of reionization. We analyze ALMA observations of the [C\,\textsc{ii}] 158~$μ$m emission line and the far-infrared (FIR) continuum, which trace cold interstellar gas and dust-reprocessed radiation from star formation and AGN heating. The quasar host shows star formation rates (SFRs) of $544$--$3764~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from [C\,\textsc{ii}] and $1861$--$2932~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from FIR emission, while the companion galaxy exhibits lower SFRs of $21$--$145$ and $76$--$211~\mathrm{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}$ from the same diagnostics. Both galaxies follow typical $L_{\mathrm{[C\,II]}}/L_{\mathrm{FIR}}$ ratios observed in star-forming galaxies and show no evidence for a [C\,\textsc{ii}] deficit, indicating that stellar heating dominates the interstellar medium energetics. The [C\,\textsc{ii}] moment maps reveal compact emission with centrally peaked intensity and ordered rotational kinematics in both systems. Velocity dispersions remain well below values associated with powerful AGN-driven outflows, and no significant morphological asymmetries or disturbed velocity fields indicative of AGN feedback or major mergers are detected, although marginal kinematic substructure in the quasar's high-velocity channels warrants further investigation. Although the companion lies at a projected distance of $18.248 \pm 0.277$~kpc within the quasar proximity zone, neither morphological nor kinematic signatures indicate AGN-driven outflows affecting the circumgalactic medium. We therefore interpret this system as being observed in a pre-outflow accretion phase, where rapid supermassive black hole growth precedes the development of large-scale AGN feedback.

title: Spatially resolved metallicity and ionization in the merging system Gz9p3 at z=9.3
toc_summary: ISM in merging galaxy Gz9p3 at z=9.3
background_knowledge: 在宇宙的再电离纪元（Epoch of Reionization），第一批星系开始形成并组装，它们内部的星际介质（ISM）是理解早期星系演化、恒星形成和黑洞生长的关键。根据宇宙学冷暗物质（ΛCDM）模型，星系通过并合与吸积过程逐级增长，而并合事件会剧烈搅动星际气体，触发星暴并改变气体金属丰度。随着詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的投入使用，其近红外光谱仪（NIRSpec）和中红外仪器（MIRI）的积分场光谱（IFS）能力使得对 z > 9 的高红移星系进行空间分辨观测成为可能。通过分析发射线如 [O III]、Hβ 等，可以诊断电离气体的物理条件、金属丰度（通常以 12+log(O/H) 度量）、电离效率（ξ_ion）以及恒星形成的爆发性（burstiness）。这些参数的空间分布揭示了并合星系内部不同区域（如中心团块和潮汐尾）的演化差异，为我们描绘出早期星系组装过程的动态画卷。
contribution: 本研究利用 JWST NIRSpec 和 MIRI 的积分场光谱及 MIRI 成像，对红移 z=9.3 的并合星系 Gz9p3 进行了空间分辨分析。摘要指出，该星系在紫外和光学静止坐标系下呈现团块状形态，发射线覆盖了从中心团块到尾部约 5 kpc 的范围。积分光谱测量得到总恒星形成率为 13.4 ± 1.8 M☉ yr⁻¹，金属丰度 12+log(O/H) = 7.84 ± 0.05，电离效率 ξ_ion = 25.4 ± 0.1 erg⁻¹ Hz，爆发参数为 0.9 ± 0.1。空间分辨分析揭示出显著差异：光学 [O III] 发射在星系主体中达到峰值，而远红外 [O III] 发射则朝尾部方向增强，表明尾部与主体星系 ISM 的物理条件不同。综合结果表明，尾部区域正经历一次近期、贫金属的星暴，而中心团块则更为演化且金属富集，并显示出极端激发的证据。这项工作展示了 JWST 空间分辨光谱在再电离纪元星系研究中的强大能力。
summary: Studying the interstellar medium (ISM) in merging high-redshift galaxies is crucial for understanding early galaxy assembly, star formation, and black hole growth, predicted by hierarchical $Λ$CDM models. Deep imaging and spatially resolved spectroscopy with JWST enable unprecedented insight into these processes, even for galaxies in the Epoch of Reionization. We present NIRSpec and MIRI integral field spectroscopy and MIRI imaging of the merging galaxy Gz9p3 at z=9.3 of the UV and optical rest-frame showing a clumpy morphology in the continuum as well as line emission covering the entire galaxy over a range of 5 kpc from the central clump to the tail region. We analyze the integrated spectrum as well as different apertures in the galaxy allowing a spatially resolved characterization of the ionized ISM of this galaxy. We compare our measurements with archival NIRCam imaging and ALMA data. We measure a total star formation rate of 13.4 $\pm$ 1.8 Msun yr$^{-1}$, a metallicity of 12+log(O/H) = 7.84 $\pm$ 0.05 and $ξ_{ion}$= 25.4 $\pm$ 0.1 erg$^{-1}$ Hz and a burstiness parameter of 0.9 $\pm$ 0.1 for the integrated spectrum. We find large spatial differences in these parameters between the central clump and the tail region. The optical [OIII] emission peaks in the main galaxy, the far-infrared [OIII] emission peaks towards the tail, indicating different physical conditions in the ISM of the tail and main galaxy. This study presents the spatially resolved ISM analyses of a galaxy at z>9, revealing nebular line emission and strong spatial variations in star formation, metallicity, physical conditions, and ionizing efficiency. The results indicate a recent, metal-poor starburst in a tail alongside a more evolved, enriched central clump with evidence for extreme excitation. This demonstrates the power of spatially resolved JWST spectroscopy of galaxies in the Epoch of Reionization.

title: Quiescent fractions in high-redshift galaxy groups reflect their hot-or-cold state of gas accretion
toc_summary: Quiescent fractions in high-z groups track gas accretion mode
background_knowledge: 在星系形成与演化的框架中，星系周围的热气体晕的吸积模式是一个核心物理过程。理论预测与数值模拟表明，暗物质晕中的气体吸积存在两种主要模式：冷吸积（cold accretion）和热吸积（hot accretion）。在冷吸积模式下，气体沿着宇宙纤维结构以较低的温度和较高的密度直接流入星系中心，为持续的恒星形成提供充足燃料。随着暗晕质量增长并超过一个特征质量（约 10^12 太阳质量），吸积气体受到激波加热，进入热吸积状态。此时气体被加热至维里温度附近，形成准静态的热气体晕，恒星形成所需的气体供应受到抑制，这一转变被称为“热阻断”（hot quenching）。因此，冷吸积通常与活跃的恒星形成星系相关联，而热吸积则为星系进入宁静（quiescent）状态创造了条件。在高红移宇宙中，星系团与星系群作为正在形成的密集环境，是检验这些理论预言的理想实验室。通过测量这些系统中星系宁静比例（quiescent fraction）的空间分布、与暗晕吸积状态的关系，可以揭示环境效应与内部物理过程在星系淬灭中的相对作用，并回答“星系何时、为何停止形成恒星”这一关键问题。
contribution: 该研究利用 COSMOS2020 巡天的深度多波段数据，针对 16 个光谱证认的红移 1.6 至 3.6 之间的星系群（暗晕质量范围约为 10^12.8 至 10^13.9 太阳质量），构建了一种基于成员概率的星系宁静比例测量方法。通过拟合候选星系的光谱能量分布，论文首次高显著性地展示了高红移星系群的宁静比例与其所在暗晕预期冷/热吸积状态之间存在关联：在处于热吸积状态的星系群中，宁静比例可达约 50%；而在冷吸积星系群中，宁静比例与零一致。在成熟的热吸积星系群中，大质量宁静星系显著聚集在内部区域（R < 0.5 R_vir），相对于外围存在 4.4σ 的超出现象。大部分星系群尚未形成清晰的“最亮群星系”，且最亮成员之间的恒星质量差距较小（通常 M_{*,1}/M_{*,2} < 3），表明这些系统仍处于活跃的并合增长阶段，而非动力学弛豫的成熟结构。与之相符，主导星系的恒星质量超出（相对于恒星-晕质量关系预期值）并不能预测星系群的宁静比例。这些结果支持一幅物理图像：气体吸积从冷到热的转变促发了宁静状态的出现，其机制可能涉及激波加热的星系群内气体对纤维状冷流的截断，导致一种由内而外的气体饥饿（inside-out starvation）。该研究暗示，在这些高红移结构中，环境效应比内部过程在塑造宁静星系群体中扮演了更重要的角色。
summary: Cold accretion and quenching are closely related aspects of galaxy evolution, as sustained gas supply is required to maintain star formation. High-redshift galaxy groups therefore provide a valuable laboratory for testing how the thermal state of accreting gas relates to the emergence of quiescence. We measure quiescent fractions in a sample of 16 spectroscopically confirmed galaxy groups at $1.6<z<3.6$, spanning halo masses from $10^{12.8},{\rm M_\odot}$ to $10^{13.9},{\rm M_\odot}$, by fitting the SEDs of candidate member galaxies selected from the COSMOS2020 catalog and using a membership-probability approach to estimate group quiescent fractions. We compare these quiescent fractions to the expected cold or hot accretion state of each halo and find evidence for a correlation: quiescent fractions reach about 50 percent in groups in the hot-accretion regime and are consistent with zero in groups in the cold-accretion regime. In mature hot-accreting groups, massive quiescent galaxies are preferentially found in the inner regions ($R<0.5R_{\rm vir}$), with a 4.4-sigma excess relative to the outskirts. Most groups lack a clearly established brightest group galaxy and instead show small stellar-mass gaps, typically $M_{*,1}/M_{*,2}<3$, indicating that they remain in an active assembly phase rather than being dynamically evolved systems. Consistently, the stellar-mass excess of the dominant galaxy, measured relative to the SHMR expectation, does not predict the group quiescent fraction. Taken together, our results support a picture in which the cold-to-hot transition in gas accretion contributes to the onset of quiescence, possibly through inside-out starvation associated with filament disruption in shock-heated intra-group gas, and suggest that environment plays a greater role than internal processes in shaping the quiescent galaxy population in these structures.

title: A study of the spatial evolution of the Radcliffe wave in a sample of young open star clusters
toc_summary: Radcliffe wave dynamics in young clusters
background_knowledge: 拉德克利夫波（Radcliffe wave）是近期在银河系中识别出的一个巨型气体与恒星形成区结构，它形似一条绵延约 9 千秒差距的正弦状链条，在银道面上下起伏，振幅可达约 160 秒差距。该结构包含了大量著名的恒星形成复合体（如猎户座分子云），并被视为本星系臂（Local Arm）的重要组成。研究拉德克利夫波的形成与演化，对于理解银河系局部的引力势、星际介质扰动历史以及恒星形成的触发机制具有关键意义。通常利用年轻疏散星团（open star clusters）作为示踪体，因为它们保留了其诞生环境的运动学信息。通过轨道积分（orbit integration）回溯或预测这些星团的空间分布，可以推断气体结构的过去形态与未来趋势。目前主流假说包括：银河系磁场中的帕克不稳定性（Parker instability）引发初始扰动，或者由卫星星系相互作用等外部扰动所致。精确测定该波动的延续时间与振幅特征，有助于区分不同模型。
contribution:
本研究选取了 139 个与拉德克利夫波紧密成协的年轻疏散星团，通过重建它们在过去 3000 万年及未来 3000 万年的空间分布与运动学状态，分析了该波动结构的时域演化。主要发现包括：
- 在过去 1000–1500 万年期间，这些星团在银道面（XY 平面）上的投影呈现为一条与 Y 轴倾斜的长窄链，其垂直坐标（Z 方向）展现出清晰的波状行为，符合拉德克利夫波的特征。
- 这种垂直波动在未来 1500–2000 万年仍将持续。
- 一项新发现是，在整个过去 3000 万年的区间内，均存在幅度高达 200 秒差距的垂直扰动，这远远早于之前认为的波动起始时间。
- 这一结果对“初始扰动源于银河系磁场帕克不稳定性”的经典场景提出了质疑，因为该机制通常难以解释如此长时间持续且大幅度的垂直振荡。
summary: A sample of 139 young open star clusters closely associated with the Radcliffe wave is considered. Modeling their spatial distribution and kinematics over a time interval of 30 Myrs ago and 30 Myrs into the future revealed that they exhibit the main properties characteristic of a Radcliffe wave over the past 10-15 Myr. They are distributed on the galactic XY plane as a long and narrow chain inclined to the Y axis, and exhibit a wave-like behavior of their vertical coordinates up to 15 Myr in the past. This behavior of their vertical coordinates will persist over the interval of 15-20 Myr in the future. A new finding is the presence of vertical perturbations with an amplitude of deviation from the galactic symmetry plane of up to 200 pc over the entire time interval considered in the past, up to -30 Myr. This result calls into question the possibility of using a scenario in which the initial disturbance of the interstellar medium is assumed to be the Parker instability of the galactic magnetic field.

title: A Morphological Identification and Study of Radio Galaxies from LoTSS DR2. I. The "Winged'' Radio Galaxies
toc_summary: Winged radio galaxies from LoTSS DR2
background_knowledge: 射电星系是一类在射电波段具有显著辐射的活动星系，其辐射主要源自星系中心超大质量黑洞驱动的相对论性喷流。这些喷流与星系际介质相互作用，形成尺度可达数十万至百万秒差距的双瓣结构。根据射电瓣的亮度分布，射电星系通常被分为 Fanaroff-Riley I 型（FR-I，边缘暗淡）和 II 型（FR-II，边缘增亮）。翼状射电星系（Winged Radio Galaxies, WRGs）是一类形态特殊的射电星系，除了主瓣外，还具有一对次级射电瓣（称为“翼”），形成 X 形或 Z 形。这类结构被认为可能源自喷流方向的突然改变、星系并合导致的黑洞自转轴变化，或喷流回流与星系际介质的复杂相互作用。低频射电巡天（如 LOFAR）能够探测到老化的电子群体产生的弥散辐射，因而在发现和统计翼状结构上具有独特优势，有助于揭示大规模射电源的演化历程和中心引擎的活动历史。
contribution: 本文利用 LOFAR 两米巡天第二期数据发布（LoTSS DR2）的高分辨率射电图像，系统开展了射电星系形态的识别与分类工作，并首次发布了一个大规模翼状射电星系（WRGs）新样本。研究共确认 621 个新 WRGs 和 403 个候选体；在已确认的源中，382 个被归类为 X 形射电星系（XRGs），239 个为 Z 形射电星系（ZRGs）。对样本的基本参数进行了估算，并根据 Fanaroff-Riley 分类体系进行了判定：约 88% 的翼状源表现出边缘增亮特征，平均射电光度较高（log₁₀[P₁₄₄MHz / W Hz⁻¹] = 26.25），符合 FR-II 型特征。144 MHz 至 1.4 GHz 的平均谱指数为 –0.84，比此前基于 VLA FIRST 高频巡天得到的翼状源谱指数更陡，表明本研究能探测到更暗弱的射电源。样本的中值线性大小为 498 kpc，证实其为大尺度结构，其中约 16% 的源尺寸超过 0.7 Mpc，成为巨射电星系的候选体。
summary: We conducted an extensive identification and analysis of various morphological classes and subclasses of radio galaxies using the latest high-resolution data from the second data release of the LOFAR Two-Metre Sky Survey (LoTSS DR2). This paper presents the first results of our large-scale investigation: a new catalog of ``winged" radio galaxies (WRGs). These objects represent a fascinating class of irregular radio galaxies, characterized by a pair of secondary radio lobes (``wings") in addition to the primary active lobes. We identified and cataloged 621 new WRGs and 403 additional candidates. Among the confirmed winged sources, 382 are classified as ``X"-shaped radio galaxies (XRGs), while the remaining 239 are ``Z"-shaped radio galaxies (ZRGs). We also estimated several basic parameters for these winged sources and performed a Fanaroff-Riley (FR) classification. Our results show that the majority of the sources ($\sim$88\%) exhibit edge-brightened radio lobes and high average radio power ($\rm log_{10}[P_{144MHz} / W Hz^{-1}]$ = 26.25), consistent with an FR-II classification. The average spectral index between 144 MHz and 1.4 GHz is --0.84, which is steeper than that found for previously identified winged sources based on higher-frequency data from the VLA Faint Images of the Radio Sky at Twenty-Centimeters (FIRST) survey. This indicates that our study is capable of detecting fainter sources. The median linear size of the winged sources, 498 kpc, confirms that these are large-scale structures, with approximately 16\% having sizes exceeding 0.7 Mpc, making them potential candidates for giant radio galaxies.

title: Formalizing Galaxy Population Evolution: Drift and Mergers as Transport Processes on Manifolds
toc_summary: Galaxy evolution as transport on manifolds
background_knowledge: 星系形成与演化是当代天体物理的核心问题之一。传统上，人们通过统计大量星系的观测属性（如光度、恒星质量、颜色、形态等）来研究星系数目的分布及其随宇宙时的变化，典型手段包括光度函数（Luminosity Function）和恒星质量函数（Stellar Mass Function）。然而，这些统计量只是星系底层物理状态在高维“状态空间”中的低维投影，并不能直接反映驱动演化的动力学过程。近年来，随着大规模巡天数据的积累，研究者开始尝试利用流形学习（Manifold Learning）等数据驱动方法，从观测数据中重构星系的状态空间，进而探索星系演化的“轨迹”。这种思路将星系群体视为高维流形上的概率密度分布，其随时间的演化可由类似于扩散、漂移和随机跳跃（如并合）的输运过程描述，从而为理解星系演化的物理机制提供了统一的理论框架。
contribution: 本文构建了一个统一的数学框架，将星系演化形式化为星系流形上概率测度的时间演化。其中星系状态用流形上的隐变量 $θ\in\mathcal{M}$ 表示，星系群体用密度 $ρ(θ,t)$ 描述，演化由包含连续输运和非局域跳跃过程的广义方程支配。通过将流形学习重新解释为测度的前推，明确了观测测度、表示测度和物理测度之间的区别，并强调流形坐标本身不一定需要具有直接的物理意义。在此图景下，光度函数和恒星质量函数仅是单一底层动力学机制的投影可观测量，它们在观测空间中一般不再构成封闭方程。该框架包含了现有模型作为极限情况：约化到单一质量变量时得到连续性方程模型，而加入并合后的可加性假设则恢复 Smoluchowski 凝聚方程。进一步证明，光度函数的演化自然可用 Schechter 函数族描述，其表观稳定性可解释为投影的有效后果。由于观测量是测度的投影，星系演化推断就变成了从数据中恢复流形动力学的统计反问题。这项工作将研究重心从直接拟合观测统计量转移到推断底层状态空间动力学，从而架起了流形学习与物理理论之间的桥梁。
summary: Galaxy evolution is commonly described through the time evolution of observational statistics such as luminosity functions and stellar mass functions. However, these quantities are projections of an underlying multivariate galaxy state space rather than fundamental dynamical variables. We develop a unified framework in which galaxy evolution is formulated as the time evolution of a probability measure on the galaxy manifold. Representing galaxy states by latent variables $θ\in\mathcal{M}$ and the population by a density $ρ(θ,t)$, the evolution is governed by a general equation containing continuous transport and nonlocal jump processes. By reinterpreting manifold learning as the pushforward of measures, we distinguish observational, representation, and physical measures, and emphasize that manifold coordinates themselves need not carry direct physical meaning. In this picture, luminosity functions and stellar mass functions arise as projected observables of a single underlying dynamics, and generally do not form closed equations in observational space. The framework contains existing models as limiting cases: reduction to a single mass variable yields continuity-equation models, while additive post-merger states recover the Smoluchowski coagulation equation. We further show that luminosity-function evolution is naturally described within the Schechter family, whose apparent stability is interpreted as an effective consequence of projection. Since observables are projections of measures, inference of galaxy evolution becomes a statistical inverse problem of recovering manifold dynamics from data. This framework shifts the focus from fitting observed statistics directly to inferring the underlying state-space dynamics, thereby bridging manifold learning and physical theory.

title: Short timescale variation in the submillimeter flux of Sagittarius A*
toc_summary: Submm flux flickering in Sgr A* on minute timescales
background_knowledge: 人马座A*（Sagittarius A*, Sgr A*）是银河系中心的超大质量黑洞，质量约为4百万太阳质量，其吸积流和喷流活动在射电到X射线等多波段都展现出强烈的光变。亚毫米波段（如340 GHz）的辐射被认为来自靠近事件视界的内区，因此短时标的光变特征为研究黑洞视界尺度物理和吸积过程提供了重要探针。通常，吸积流的光变曲线呈现红噪声（red noise）主导的功率谱，即低频段功率增强，反映长时标的相关涨落。理论模型和数值模拟（如广义相对论磁流体力学模拟）预测，在接近黑洞最内稳定圆轨道（ISCO）的动力学时标上，光变可能表现出特定特征，如准周期振荡（QPO）或截断幂律谱。对Sgr A*的监测是理解低光度活动星系核（AGN）吸积物理的关键途径。
contribution: 本文利用ALMA第3周期的高时间分辨率观测，研究了Sgr A*在340 GHz的亚毫米波流量随短时标的变化。通过细致的自校准和相对测光技术，实现了10秒时间间隔的快照成像，有效抑制了大气和仪器效应。研究采用结构函数、Lomb-Scargle周期图以及状态空间模型自回归谱分析，对20秒到约80分钟时标范围进行了系统搜索。主要发现是：没有显著的窄带准周期振荡（QPO），相反，在短时标（约2.3–6.3分钟以下）光变表现出平坦、类似白噪声的功率谱特性，而在更长的时标上则呈现典型的红噪声行为。这种平坦成分在活跃和宁静阶段均存在，表明该时标上的涨落是统计独立的。作者将平坦区的上边界解释为去相关短时标涨落向长时标相关光变过渡的经验时标，但这一成分的物理起源仍不确定，因为以往的理论和数值模拟通常预测红噪声或截断幂律形式的光变谱。
summary: We study short-timescale 340 GHz flux-density variability of Sgr A* using ALMA Cycle 3 observations. Careful self-calibration enabled 10 s snapshot imaging with very high effective image-domain SNR, allowing high-cadence monitoring of Galactic Center sources. To reduce atmospheric and instrumental effects, we measured Sgr A* relative to multiple non-variable sources in the same field and corrected apparent variability caused by time-dependent u-v coverage and PSF changes using simulations with a static input model. We then searched for characteristic timescales over 20 s < tau < Tobs/3 using structure functions, the Lomb--Scargle method, and state-space-model autoregressive spectral analysis. No dominant narrow periodicity is found. Instead, the data show a short-timescale flat, white-noise-like regime at tau below about 2.3--6.3 min, followed by red-noise-like behavior at longer timescales. This flat regime appears in both active and quiescent phases, suggesting statistically independent fluctuations on these timescales. We interpret its upper boundary as an empirical transition timescale between decorrelated short-timescale fluctuations and longer-timescale correlated variability. The physical origin of this flat component remains uncertain, since previous theoretical and numerical studies more commonly report red-noise-like or broken-power-law variability.

title: VLTI-GRAVITY observations of blazars
toc_summary: Near-infrared interferometry of blazar jets
background_knowledge: 耀变体（blazar）是一类活动星系核（AGN），其相对论性喷流几乎指向地球，因而观测到强烈的相对论聚束效应。在靠近中心黑洞的喷流加速区，物理过程（如粒子加速、辐射机制等）是活动星系核研究的核心问题之一。然而，传统甚长基线干涉测量（VLBI）主要在毫米/亚毫米波段实现了对喷流秒差距尺度的成像，而近红外波段则一直未能达到同样的空间分辨率。这是因为近红外干涉测量面临大气扰动和微弱光源的挑战。VLTI（甚大望远镜干涉阵）配备的第二代仪器GRAVITY，结合自适应光学和条纹追踪技术，首次将毫角秒级的近红外干涉测量应用于耀变体，有望探测到更靠近黑洞的喷流基部的辐射。这一波段对应的高能非热辐射（同步辐射）对理解喷流中的粒子能量分布极为关键。
contribution:
本文首次尝试利用VLTI-GRAVITY对耀变体的近红外发射进行毫角秒级空间分辨观测。主要工作包括：
- 对正在耀发态的耀变体Ton 599进行了干涉测量，通过模型拟合可见度平方数据，发现其不能简单描述为一个未分解点源，除非存在仪器导致的额外相干损失；现有数据无法区分“未分解点源+延展发射”模型与“单一高斯成分”模型，但均表明近红外发射可能源自未分解或仅部分分解的喷流基部。
- 同时利用GRAVITY的宽场模式，尝试观测了四个非耀发耀变体，但因其相对较暗，数据质量较差或未探测到信号，未能进行有效建模。
- 这些观测证明了近红外干涉测量探测耀变体致密喷流的可行性，并指出随着GRAVITY+性能的提升，未来有望真正空间分解并成像耀变体喷流的近红外辐射。
summary: Parsec-scale jets of blazars have so far been spatially resolved only in millimeter and submillimeter wavelengths, where very long baseline interferometry can be used to obtain milliarcsecond-scale images of the jets. We have attempted to spatially resolve the near-infrared emission in jet-dominated blazars for the first time. We used the VLTI-GRAVITY instrument to obtain milliarcsecond-scale near-infrared interferometric observations of a flaring blazar Ton 599. Additionally, we observed four non-flaring blazars using the GRAVITY-wide mode, where a nearby bright star is used as a fringe tracker. We modeled the squared visibilities of Ton 599 and found that they are incompatible with a single unresolved point source unless there is a significant amount of additional unknown coherence loss in the instrument. With the present data, we cannot distinguish between a model with an unresolved point source and extended emission or coherence loss and a model with a single Gaussian component. This suggests that we are seeing the unresolved or only partially resolved jet-base in near-infrared wavelengths. The wide-field mode of GRAVITY was challenging for the additional relatively faint targets, resulting in either non-detections or poor-quality data that could not be modeled. Our observations demonstrate that it is possible to detect the compact jet emission in blazars with near-infrared interferometry, suggesting that with the improved GRAVITY+ instrument it will be possible to spatially resolve and image the near-infrared emission of blazar jets.

title: On the redshift evolution of the spin parameter in cosmological simulations
toc_summary: Halo spin parameter redshift evolution
background_knowledge: 在冷暗物质（LCDM）宇宙学模型下，暗物质晕（dark matter halo）的自旋参数（spin parameter）是描述晕的角动量与能量之间关系的重要无量纲量。它大致反映了晕的旋转支撑程度，对理解星系形成过程中气体冷却、角动量转移以及盘星系的建立具有关键作用。通常，自旋参数被定义为 λ = J|E|^{1/2} / (GM^{5/2})，其中 J 是角动量，E 是总能量，M 是质量，G 是引力常数。数值模拟表明，在固定红移处，暗物质晕的自旋参数服从对数正态分布，但该分布的均值与弥散随红移的演化却尚未被充分厘清。早期研究受限于质量分辨率或缺乏解析拟合公式，难以在星系形成的半解析模型（semi-analytic model）或半经验模型（semi-empirical model）中可靠地引入红移依赖的自旋分布。本领域长期存在的一个核心问题是：暗物质晕的自旋参数究竟如何随宇宙时演化？是基本不变，还是存在系统性的演化趋势？这直接影响我们模拟星系形态和标度关系的准确性。
contribution: 本文利用一套从红移 z=0 到 5、分辨率受控的 LCDM N 体模拟，系统地研究了两种常用自旋定义——Peebles 定义的 λ 和 Bullock 定义的 λ'——的均值与弥散随红移的演化。主要发现包括：（1）对于 ln(λ)，其均值随红移呈轻微但统计显著的线性增长；对于 ln(λ')，则呈现非单调演化，在 z~1-2 处出现拐点（先增后减）。（2）验证了这些趋势不依赖于数值分辨率或晕的选取定义（例如球冠 overdensity 判据）。（3）提供了上述演化趋势的闭合形式拟合函数，可用于在 0<z<5 范围内直接生成任意红移处的物理自旋值。这项工作为星系形成的半解析和半经验模型提供了一个红移依赖的自旋分布方案，替代常用但不精确的恒定分布假设，有助于提高对盘星系形成与角动量演化的建模水平。
summary: Although the spin parameter of dark matter halos is well known to follow a log-normal distribution at fixed epoch, its quantitative redshift evolution - encompassing both the mean and the dispersion - remains only partially explored. Prior studies either lack the mass resolution required to establish reliable evolutionary trends or do not provide analytical relations that enable forward modelling. Using a suite of LCDM N-body simulations with controlled resolution across the redshift range 0 < z < 5, we characterise the evolution of the mean and dispersion of the Peebles (lambda) and Bullock (lambda') definitions of spin. We find a mild but statistically robust linear evolution for ln(lambda) and a non-monotonic trend with a turnover at z ~ 1 - 2 for ln lambda', which we verify are unaffected by mass resolution of choice of halo definition. We provide closed-form fitting functions for these trends that allow modellers to draw physically motivated spin values at any redshift within our range of validity. This is a practical, redshift-dependent alternative to the common assumption of a constant spin distribution, and provides a useful input to semi-empirical and semi-analytic models of galaxy formation.

title: Precision Analysis for $\boldsymbol{H_0}$ Using Upcoming Multi-band Gravitational Wave Observations
toc_summary: Multi-band GW observations constrain H0 with PBHs
background_knowledge: 测量哈勃常数（Hubble constant, H0）是宇宙学中一个核心任务，当前的直接测量与早期宇宙间接推断之间存在显著的不一致，即“哈勃冲突”（Hubble tension）。引力波（GW）作为一种独立于宇宙距离阶梯的“标准汽笛”（standard siren），为 H0 的精确测定提供了全新途径。传统方法依赖双致密星并合产生的引力波，通过波形直接推断光度距离，再结合电磁对应体的红移信息来标定 H0。近年来，原初黑洞（Primordial Black Holes, PBHs）作为引力波源受到越来越多的关注：它们可能在早期宇宙密度扰动中直接坍缩形成，并可能贡献暗物质的一部分。PBHs 不仅可以通过双星并合辐射引力波，还能通过标量扰动诱导产生一个随机引力波背景（scalar-induced GW background）。多频段引力波探测结合了不同灵敏度的观测设备——如低频的脉冲星计时阵列（SKA）和高频的地基干涉仪（爱因斯坦望远镜 ET）——能够同时覆盖从纳赫兹到千赫兹的广阔频段，显著提升对 PBH 参数（如质量 M_PBH 和丰度 f_PBH）的约束精度，进而将这种精度传递到 H0 的测量上。此类研究利用费舍尔矩阵（Fisher matrix）对信噪比（SNR）等观测量进行统计预报，可量化分析未来探测器对 H0 不确定度的压制能力，为多信使天文与宇宙学交叉研究提供了新范式。
contribution: 本研究系统探讨了利用多频段引力波观测（结合 SKA 和 ET）通过原初黑洞来限制哈勃常数 H0 的不确定度。工作综合了 PBHs 的标量诱导引力波与并合诱导引力波两种信号，采用信噪比（SNR）估计和费舍尔矩阵分析，对 PBH 的关键参数（质量 M_PBH 和丰度 f_PBH）进行统计预报。在设定 SNR ≥ 1 的条件下，确定了可探测的 PBH 参数空间，并将参数不确定度传递到 H0 的测量误差上。结果显示：采用保守精度要求（δθ_i/θ_i ≤ 0.1，θ_i 代表 M_PBH 或 f_PBH）时，δH0 ≲ 2 km s⁻¹ Mpc⁻¹；若精度要求提升至乐观水平（≤0.01），δH0 可达到 O(0.1) km s⁻¹ Mpc⁻¹ 量级。进一步分析表明，结果对 H0 的基准值选取不敏感，仅对 PBH 坍缩效率有中等程度的依赖。该发现证实多频段引力波观测能为限制 H0 不确定度提供独立且互补的手段，有望构建一种不依赖传统距离阶梯的新型哈勃参数测量方法。
summary: We investigate how multi-band gravitational wave (GW) observations can constrain the uncertainties in the Hubble parameter ($H_0$) using primordial black holes (PBHs) as possible sources. Our framework combines scalar-induced and merger-induced GWs from PBHs, and forecasts on a combination of two future detectors Square Kilometre Array (SKA) and the Einstein Telescope (ET), enabling a multi-band analysis. We perform a statistical forecast of the PBH parameters, $M_{\rm PBH}$ and $f_{\rm PBH}$, using signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimates and Fisher matrix analysis. Imposing $\mathrm{SNR} \geq 1$, we identify the accessible PBH parameter space and propagate these uncertainties to estimate the corresponding uncertainties in $H_0$. For $δθ_i/θ_i \leq 0.1$, with $θ_i \equiv M_{\rm PBH}(f_{\rm PBH})$, we find $δH_0 \lesssim 2~{\rm km\,s^{-1}\,Mpc^{-1}}$ in a conservative approach, improving to $δH_0 \lesssim \mathcal{O}(0.1)~{\rm km\,s^{-1}\,Mpc^{-1}}$ for $δθ_i/θ_i \leq 0.01$ for an optimistic approach of precision measurement. The results are further found to be largely insensitive to the fiducial choice of the $H_0$, with only moderate dependence on the PBH collapse efficiency. These findings demonstrate that multi-band GW observations provide an independent and complementary approach to constraining the uncertainties in $H_0$, with the potential to provide a novel, cosmic distance ladder-independent measure of the Hubble parameter.

title: Gauge-independent approach to inflation in quadratic gravity
toc_summary: Gauge-independent inflation in quadratic gravity
background_knowledge: 在宇宙学中，暴涨（inflation）是极早期宇宙的一段加速膨胀时期，成功解释了均匀性、平坦性和结构起源等问题。除了简单的单场慢滚模型外，基于修改引力的暴涨模型也备受关注，其中最具代表性的是 Starobinsky 模型，它通过在爱因斯坦-希尔伯特作用量中加入里奇标量的平方项（R² 项）来实现暴涨。这类包含曲率平方项的引力理论统称为“二次引力”（quadratic gravity）。在场论层面，R² 项会引入一个额外的标量自由度，通常被称为“标量子”（scalaron）。通过共形变换（conformal transformation），可以将原始的 Jordan 框架（度规框架）转换到 Einstein 框架（标量-张量理论框架），此时理论变为广义相对论加上一个具有特定势能的标量场。然而，在宇宙学微扰理论中，不同框架下的计算有时会得到看似矛盾的结论，例如关于微扰稳定性的问题。为了准确判断物理效应与规范假象，通常采用规范不变变量（如 Bardeen 势）来分析微扰动力学。此前有研究指出，在牛顿规范（Newtonian gauge）下，二次引力的标量微扰会出现指数增长，表现为不稳定性，但这一结果的物理实质仍有待澄清。
contribution:
本文在 Einstein 框架下，以规范无关的方式系统研究了二次引力中标量型宇宙学线性微扰。作者推导了运动方程，并引入三组规范不变变量来描述微扰，从而能够清晰区分真实物理效应与规范假象。在超视界极限下，他们得到了相关规范不变变量的领头阶行为，并对比分析了若干常用规范中的微扰演化。
- 主要发现：在牛顿规范中，度规微扰确实呈现出指数增长，看似存在不稳定性。然而，这种增长并非普适的，而是规范依赖的；在本文分析的其他规范中，微扰在微扰论适用范围内部保持良好的行为。因此，物理可观测量可以自洽地计算，所见的“不稳定性”实际上是一个规范假象，而非理论的病态特征。
- 此外，工作还展示了规范不变变量在框架变换（Jordan 框架与 Einstein 框架之间）下的演化行为变化，澄清了两个框架下所得结果的关系，进一步确认了物理结果应与框架选择无关。
summary: We investigate the scalar sector of linear cosmological perturbations in quadratic gravity. Working in the Einstein frame, we derive the equations of motion in a gauge-independent manner and express them in terms of three sets of gauge-invariant variables. This approach allows us to distinguish genuine physical effects from gauge artefacts, which is particularly relevant for assessing the stability of perturbations in this theory. In the superhorizon limit, we obtain the leading-order behaviour of the relevant gauge-invariant variables and analyse the perturbations in several commonly used gauges. We find that the Newtonian gauge exhibits an apparent instability, characterised by the exponential growth of the metric perturbations. However, this growth is non-generic and gauge-dependent; in the other gauges analysed in this work, the perturbations remain well behaved within the perturbative regime. Physical observables can thus be consistently computed, and the apparent instability is identified as a gauge artefact rather than a pathology of the theory. Our analysis also demonstrates how the evolution behaviour of a gauge-invariant variable changes under the frame transformation and clarifies the relation between results obtained in the Jordan and Einstein frames.

title: Reionization, UV Luminosity and 21$\,$cm Sensitivity to Primordial Magnetic Fields: Impact of Energy Losses
toc_summary: Primordial magnetic fields and 21cm constraints
background_knowledge: 原初磁场（Primordial Magnetic Fields, PMFs）是指宇宙极早期可能产生的磁场。其起源目前尚无定论，可能来自暴胀、相变等过程，有望解释今天在宇宙大尺度结构（如星系团、纤维状结构）中观测到的磁场种子。如果 PMF 确实存在，它们会在宇宙演化过程中对电离和热历史、物质扰动增长等留下可观测的印记。再电离时期（Epoch of Reionization, EoR）是宇宙从黑暗时代过渡到被第一批天体再电离的关键阶段，对理解第一代星系形成和宇宙大尺度结构至关重要。21 厘米信号来自中性氢的超精细结构跃迁，是探测再电离时期三维结构（即21 厘米宇宙学）的核心工具。当前，诸如 HERA（Hydrogen Epoch of Reionization Array）等干涉阵正在进行相关观测。PMF 会通过多种物理机制影响再电离过程，例如通过磁场压力、耗散加热等改变气体温度和电离历史，从而在星系 UV 光度函数和 21 厘米信号中留下痕迹。然而，PMF 本身并非恒定不变，它会因双极扩散和湍流衰减等能量耗散过程而随时间衰减。以往的研究常忽略这种衰减，导致对 PMF 的限制可能偏于严格。因此，在自洽地处理 PMF 与星系际介质（Intergalactic Medium, IGM）演化的耦合后，才能更可靠地从当前和未来观测中提取对 PMF 的约束。
contribution: 本文重新审视了原初磁场（PMF）的限制，首次系统地考虑了从复合到再电离全过程中通过双极扩散（ambipolar diffusion）和衰减湍流（decaying turbulence）产生的能量损失，这些损失会使磁场强度随时间逐步减弱。作者将上述效应在数值代码 HyRec 和 exo21cmFAST 中实现，从而自洽地模拟 PMF 与天体物理过程直到再电离的相互作用。利用神经网络模拟器 NNERO，结合再电离历史和星系 UV 光度函数这两个晚期探针，进行了马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）分析。结果发现，计入 PMF 能量损失后，磁场强度的降低抑制了其在可观测量上的印迹，因此之前基于恒定磁场假设获得的限制得到了显著放宽。此外，通过费舍尔矩阵（Fisher matrix）分析，论文评估了 21 厘米信号实验 HERA 对 PMF 在星系际介质扰动上印迹的灵敏度，显示 21 厘米宇宙学有望显著改进当前限制。这项工作强调了在提取当前限制和未来灵敏度时，对 PMF 演化与 IGM 演化进行自洽建模的重要性。
summary: Magnetic fields with field strengths between $10^{-17}\,$G and a few Nanogauss are expected to exist today in the intergalactic medium (IGM). Their origin is unknown, but may be of primordial nature, in which case they would have influenced the thermal and ionization history of the IGM as well as the growth of small-scale matter perturbations. In this work, we revisit constraints on Primordial Magnetic fields (PMFs) by consistently accounting for their energy losses through ambipolar diffusion and decaying turbulences from recombination through the epoch of reionization, which progressively reduces the magnetic field strength over time. We implement these effects in ${\tt HyRec}$ and ${\tt exo21cmFAST}$ to model the interplay between PMFs and astrophysical processes up to reionization. Using a neural-network emulator (${\tt NNERO}$), we perform a MCMC analysis that combines late-time probes of the reionization history and galaxy UV luminosity functions. We find that including PMF energy losses significantly relaxes previous bounds, as the reduced field strength suppresses their imprint on observables. Employing a Fisher matrix analysis, we estimate the sensitivity of the 21$\,$cm signal experiment HERA to the PMFs' imprint on intergalactic medium perturbations and show that 21$\,$cm cosmology could significantly improve on current bounds. Our results highlight the importance of modeling PMF evolution self-consistently with the IGM evolution to extract current bounds and future sensitivities.

title: Constraints on the Primordial Black Hole Abundance using Pulsar Parameter Drifts
toc_summary: Pulsar timing limits on primordial black holes
background_knowledge: 原初黑洞是宇宙极早期由原初密度涨落直接塌缩形成的黑洞，与恒星演化形成的黑洞不同，其质量可以横跨多个量级。如果原初黑洞构成暗物质的一部分或解释地面引力波探测器观测到的双黑洞并合事件，那么产生这些原初黑洞所需的原初标量扰动必然会在二阶效应下诱导出标量诱导引力波。这类引力波的频率可低至纳赫兹频段，恰好落在脉冲星计时阵列的敏感范围内。脉冲星计时阵列通过长期监测毫秒脉冲星极稳定的自转周期，可以捕捉到引力波引起的时空扰动，具体表现为脉冲星自转周期二阶导数等参数的缓慢漂移。因此，利用脉冲星参数漂移来搜寻标量诱导引力波信号，为限制原初黑洞丰度提供了一种与电磁波、地面引力波探测互补的重要手段。
contribution: 该工作首次利用脉冲星参数漂移对标量诱导引力波进行了搜寻，并据此对原初黑洞丰度给出了严格的限制。研究基于脉冲星计时数据，通过分析脉冲星自转周期的二阶导数中可能存在的长期漂移特征，在95%置信水平下，将质量范围在 0.3 到 4×10⁴ 太阳质量之间的原初黑洞丰度 f_PBH 上限约束到低于 10⁻¹⁰。这一结果强烈否定了当前 LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA 合作组探测到的双黑洞并合事件来源于原初黑洞的假说。
summary: Primordial black holes (PBHs) provide a compelling interpretation for the binary black holes (BBHs) observed by ground-based gravitational-wave (GW) detectors, especially for those BBHs in the theoretical mass gap. In the early Universe, the scalar perturbations required to produce such PBHs inevitably generate scalar-induced GWs (SIGWs). These SIGWs peak in the sub-nanohertz band, and manifest secularly as measurable jerk-like drifts in the second derivative of pulsar spin periods. In this Letter, we perform the first search for SIGWs using pulsar parameter drifts, and place a 95\% confidence-level upper limit on the PBH abundance of $f_{\mathrm{PBH}} < 10^{-10}$ over the mass range $[3 \times 10^{-1}, 4 \times 10^{4}] M_{\odot}$. Our results strongly disfavor a PBH origin for the BBHs currently detected by the LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA (LVK) Collaborations.

title: Machine Learning for Multi-messenger Probes of New Physics and Cosmology: A Review and Perspective
toc_summary: ML-enhanced multi-messenger searches for new physics.
background_knowledge: 现代天体粒子物理学中，多信使天文学（Multi-messenger Astronomy）通过联合探测引力波、宇宙线、伽马射线、中微子等不同“信使”，以及地面加速器实验，来研究暗物质和超出标准模型的新物理。不同信使携带关于天体源或早期宇宙中粒子物理过程的互补信息：例如，引力波可探测致密天体合并及早期宇宙相变，高能中微子和伽马射线可揭示暗物质湮灭或衰变，宇宙线则直接反映高能粒子加速机制。然而，这些数据通常来自多个异构实验，格式、统计特性、系统误差各不相同，且信号常深埋于背景噪声中。传统统计方法难以有效整合如此多维度、多尺度的信息。近年来，机器学习（特别是深度学习、贝叶斯推断和生成模型）因其强大的特征提取和模式识别能力，已被用于自动处理海量异质数据、优化信号/背景判别，并在统一框架下进行联合参数推断。这为破解暗物质本质、揭示新物理信号提供了前所未有的机遇。
contribution:
本文是一篇综述与前瞻性展望，系统梳理了机器学习增强的多信使方法在探索暗物质与新物理中的现状与潜力。核心工作包括：
- 提出一个整合引力波、宇宙线、伽马射线、中微子与对撞机实验数据的统一研究框架，旨在协同提取暗物质性质与产生机制的信息。
- 规划了三项主要研究方向：（i）多信使宇宙学中的新物理分析，重点但不限于多种暗物质模型；（ii）地面宇宙线实验中新物理特征的现象学，及其与其他物理、天体物理和宇宙学观测的交叉关联；（iii）针对新物理特征，开发适用于地面宇宙线实验数据分析的机器学习方法。
- 强调机器学习在融合异构数据集中的关键作用，并指出此类交叉融合路径将为解决基础物理核心问题提供正确方向。
summary: The multi-messenger exploration of dark matter and physics beyond the Standard Model has emerged as a central direction in modern astro-particle physics, particularly following the discovery of gravitational waves. In this work, we present a comprehensive review and forward-looking perspective on machine-learning-enhanced multi-messenger approaches, combining information from gravitational waves, cosmic rays, gamma rays, neutrinos, and collider experiments. We summarize the current state of the field, discuss recent methodological developments, and outline a coherent research program aimed at integrating heterogeneous datasets within a unified inference framework. Our collaboration proposes here a plan for forthcoming analyses aiming at extracting information on the properties and interactions of dark matter, and finally on its genesis, combining multi-messenger astronomy techniques and inputs from laboratory physics. The main objectives planned in this line of research comprise: i) the multi-messenger analysis of new physics in cosmology, including mainly, but not only, several different models of dark matter; ii) the phenomenology of new physics signatures in ground-based cosmic rays experiments, with cross-correlation to the corresponding physical, astrophysical and cosmological observations; iii) the development of machine learning methods for data analysis in ground-based cosmic rays experiments, in light of the new physics signatures. We note that several groups have explored the use of multi-messenger observations, including gravitational waves, to probe alternative dark matter candidates. The present work builds on these developments by focusing on the role of machine learning in integrating heterogeneous datasets. We foresee that such a cross-fertilizing approach will represent the right path to extract information about the main questions left in fundamental physics.

title: How lonely are the Binary Compact Objects Detected by the LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA Collaboration?
toc_summary: Searching for three-body perturbations in compact binary GW signals
background_knowledge: 引力波天文学通过探测致密天体并合（如双黑洞、双中子星）产生的时空涟漪，为我们打开了研究强引力场和极端天体物理环境的新窗口。传统的引力波数据分析假设双星系统在孤立真空环境中演化，其轨道和波形完全由广义相对论的两体运动主导。然而，实际的宇宙环境并非空旷；在星系中心、球状星团等致密星场中，双星系统有可能与第三个天体发生近距离飞掠（fly-by）或交换相互作用。这类三体过程会短暂地扰乱双星的轨道运动，从而在引力波信号上留下独特的相位偏移（dephasing）和振幅调制（amplitude modulation）特征。研究这些偏离标准波形的印记，不仅能检验双星演化的环境假设，更开辟了一种全新手段：通过引力波来间接探测双星周围未被直接看到的暗弱天体，包括中等质量黑洞（IMBH）或原初黑洞等。这类研究目前尚处于起步阶段，需要结合三体动力学与广义相对论辐射反作用的高精度模型，以及对长持续时间、高信噪比引力波事件的细致搜索。
contribution: 本文构建了一个物理驱动的模型来刻画双致密星系统在遭遇第三个天体时的引力波信号畸变。模型在牛顿三体动力学框架下，引入了2.5阶后牛顿（2.5PN）辐射反作用项，能够模拟飞掠过程产生的相位偏差和振幅变化。作者从LIGO–Virgo–KAGRA（LVK）合作组的第四批引力波瞬变源表（GWTC-4）中，选取了三个信噪比高、探测器内持续时间超过10秒的事件——GW170817、GW190814和GW230627_015337，利用匹配滤波等方法系统搜索了此类畸变。结果显示，数据中没有找到任何统计显著的偏离，从而对这些双星附近存在中等质量黑洞的情形给出了严格的限制：在约0.1 AU的范围内，可以排除质量大于100倍太阳质量的中等质量黑洞，因为这类黑洞的飞掠作用足以动力学破坏双星，且这一结论不依赖于具体的波形模板，具有模型无关的稳健性。该工作首次为引力波事件近邻区域的中等质量黑洞设置了上限，并指出未来长持续时间信号有望将探测范围推至更远距离和更轻质量的致密天体，为研究星系中心、球状星团等稠密环境中的天体族群——包括恒星起源和原初起源的致密天体——开启了一扇全新的窗口。
summary: Gravitational-wave (GW) observations of compact binary coalescences (CBCs) are traditionally interpreted under the assumption that the binary evolves in isolation. However, in realistic astrophysical environments, brief three-body encounters may perturb the binary's orbital evolution and imprint deviations on the emitted GWs. We develop a physically motivated model for such interactions, retaining Newtonian three-body dynamics supplemented by leading-order ($2.5$PN) radiation-reaction within the binary. We show that such encounters produce a distinctive morphology of dephasing and amplitude modulation in GWs. We search for this kind of distortion from the LIGO--Virgo--KAGRA (LVK) GW catalog GWTC-4 on three events: GW170817, GW190814, and GW230627\_015337, chosen based on high SNR and in-band duration $\gtrsim 10~\mathrm{s}$. We find no statistically significant deviation in the data, which translates into constraints on the absence of any intermediate-mass black hole in the mass range above $\sim 10^2$ M$_\odot$ in the vicinity of these binaries of radius approximately $10^{-1}~\mathrm{AU}$. This arises from robust exclusions arising from fly-by interactions that would dynamically disrupt the binary and are directly ruled out independent of waveform modelling, placing the first upper bound on intermediate-mass black holes near these GW events. In future, with the availability of long-duration GW signals, this new avenue can probe encounters of the binary GW sources with compact objects of lighter masses at distances farther away than 1 AU and hence opens a new window to probe the population of individual compact objects of both astrophysical and primordial origin in astrophysical systems of dense environments ranging from galactic centers to dense globular clusters.

title: Testing $Λ$CDM with ANN-Reconstructed Expansion History from Cosmic Chronometers

summary: In modern cosmology, the rapid growth of high-precision observational data, along with significant theoretical advances, has intensified the challenge of identifying a robust, model-independent framework to probe the expansion history of the Universe. In this work, we propose a novel artificial neural network (ANN)-based framework for the non-parametric reconstruction of the late-time cosmic expansion. The framework is trained and validated through a three-stage screening pipeline prior to its application to real observational data. As a demonstration of its effectiveness, we reconstruct the Hubble parameter $H(z)$ using the latest cosmic chronometer measurements. Our results show that the reconstructed expansion history aligns with the predictions of the $Λ$CDM model within observational uncertainties, thereby supporting the robustness and reliability of the proposed approach.

title: Caustic Skeleton and the Local Cosmic Web: the Coma Cluster node and the Pisces-Perseus ridge
toc_summary: Caustic skeleton classifies cosmic filaments
background_knowledge: 宇宙的大尺度结构呈现出被称为“宇宙网”（cosmic web）的复杂网络，由空洞（voids）、薄片（sheets）、纤维（filaments）和节点（clusters）构成。在引力不稳定性驱动下，初始密度扰动经非线性演化，物质优先沿特定方向坍缩，形成纤维和团块。传统的结构分类和识别主要基于密度场或速度场，但“焦散骨架理论”（caustic skeleton theory）则从灾变理论（catastrophe theory）出发，关注暗物质相空间薄片在引力坍缩过程中的折叠奇点。这些奇点形成各级焦散结构，如 A3 片状焦散对应薄片或墙壁，A4 燕尾焦散（swallowtail）和 D4 脐点焦散（umbilic）等对应不同类型的纤维，A5 等对应节点。该方法提供了一种与密度无关的拓扑学分类，能够揭示结构形成的动态历史。局部宇宙（Local Universe）内，通过 2M++ 等星系巡天数据，可以重建密度场和速度场，进而获得约束的数值模拟，用以研究临近宇宙网的真实构型。其中，后发座星系团（Coma Cluster）是近域最大的富星系团节点之一，而双鱼-英仙超星系团（Pisces-Perseus Supercluster）则是一条显著的纤维状结构，是研究宇宙网纤维拓扑的理想对象。
contribution: 本文首次将焦散骨架理论应用于 Manticore-Local 模拟——基于 2M++ 星系表对局部宇宙的贝叶斯约束重构，提取了后发座星系团和双鱼-英仙纤维束这两个标志性结构的三维多尺度焦散骨架。研究显示，焦散骨架网络能够准确复现实测星系在红移空间中的大尺度分布。通过对焦散特征的层级划分，可对 2M++ 星系所处的大尺度环境进行多尺度分类。理论预测的两种拓扑不同的纤维类别——A4 燕尾焦散和 D4 脐点焦散，尽管形成历史截然不同，但在形态上却易于混淆。分析表明，D4 纤维的影响在较小尺度上愈发重要，特别是双鱼-英仙超星系团显现为明显由 D4 主导的结构，而环绕后发座星系团的“棍人”（Stickman）结构则不同。这意味着焦散骨架理论为研究邻近宇宙中最著名的纤维复合体提供了新颖的拓扑学表征手段。
summary: We apply caustic skeleton theory to the Manticore-Local simulations, which are Bayesian constrained reconstructions of the Local Universe from the 2M++ galaxy catalogue, and extract the three-dimensional multi-scale caustic skeleton of two canonical weblike structures in our Local Universe, namely the Coma Cluster and the Pisces-Perseus ridge as they represent the most prominent cluster node and filamentary artery in the nearby Universe. We show that the Caustic Skeleton network of caustic singularities accurately reproduces the observed large-scale organisation of galaxies in redshift space for one of the Manticore realisations. The hierarchy of caustic features allows us to establish a multi-scale classification of the large-scale environment in which observed 2M++ galaxies reside. One of the most interesting aspects of the theory is that it predicts two topologically distinct classes of filaments (A_4 swallowtail and D_4 umbilic caustics) that form through fundamentally different folding histories yet appear morphologically similar enough, on the surface, to be overlooked by conventional structure identifiers. We find that the influence of D_4 filaments only becomes increasingly relevant towards smaller scales, and the Pisces-Perseus Supercluster in particular is revealed to be a distinctly D_4-dominated structure compared to the extended Stickman structure around the Coma Cluster. In other words, caustic skeleton theory enables a novel topological characterisation of one of the most studied filamentary complexes in the nearby Universe. [Shortened]

title: Describing the swdatatoolkit: A Space Weather Data Analysis Library
toc_summary: Space weather data analysis toolkit
background_knowledge: 空间天气（Space Weather）研究依赖于对太阳活动、行星际空间和地球磁层等多源异构数据的综合分析。这些数据通常来自地面天文台、卫星载荷和数值模拟，涵盖电磁辐射、高能粒子、磁场等多种物理量。由于数据格式、分辨率、采集方式差异极大，研究人员需要专门的软件工具进行数据获取、预处理、特征提取和高级建模。传统的脚本式分析往往缺乏可重复性和可扩展性，而现代数据驱动方法（如机器学习）对流程标准化和模块化提出了更高要求。因此，构建一个统一、灵活、可扩展的软件库成为空间天气研究的重要基础设施需求。典型的空间天气数据分析流程包括：从多个数据源（如 SDO、STEREO、ACE 等）下载图像或时序数据，进行图像预处理（如噪声去除、边缘检测、纹理量化），提取物理参数（如活动区磁场特征），并衍生出用于预报或统计研究的高阶指标。这类工具库通常采用 Python 语言构建，利用其丰富的科学计算生态，并遵循模块化设计以支持不同任务之间的互操作性。
contribution: 本文介绍了 swdatatoolkit，一个基于 Python 的科学软件库，旨在支持太阳与空间天气数据的获取、预处理和分析。该工具库整合了多个功能域，包括从主流日球物理数据源下载数据、图像预处理、边缘检测、图像纹理量化、磁场分析，以及太阳物理研究中常用的高阶参数推导。它的模块化结构反映了空间天气数据的异构特性，为探索性分析和机器学习驱动的研究提供了可复现、可扩展的工作流。论文概述了该库的现有功能、科学动机及其在更广泛的空间天气研究生态系统中的定位。
summary: swdatatoolkit is a Python-based scientific software library designed to support the acquisition, preprocessing, and analysis of solar and space weather data. The toolkit consolidates functionality across multiple domains, including data downloading from established heliophysics sources, image preprocessing, edge detection, image texture quantification, magnetic field analysis, and the derivation of higher-level parameters commonly used in solar physics research. Its modular structure reflects the heterogeneous nature of space weather data and enables reproducible, extensible workflows for both exploratory analysis and machine-learning-driven studies. This paper presents an overview of the library's available capabilities, its scientific motivations, and its role in the broader space weather research ecosystem.

title: Forecasting the occupancy of satellite megaconstellations in SKA observations
toc_summary: SKA exposure to satellite radio interference
background_knowledge: 射电天文学通过接收来自宇宙天体的微弱射电波探索宇宙，但人造射电干扰（Radio Frequency Interference, RFI）始终是严重挑战。近年来，以星链（Starlink）、一网（OneWeb）为代表的卫星巨型星座（megaconstellations）大量部署，它们发射的通信信号可能淹没射电望远镜的接收机，造成数据饱和或污染。平方公里阵列（Square Kilometre Array, SKA）是建设中的下一代巨型射电望远镜，包含位于澳大利亚的低频阵列（SKA-Low，50–350 MHz）和位于南非的中频阵列（SKA-Mid，350 MHz–15.4 GHz），它们拥有极高的灵敏度和大视场，因此更容易受到卫星RFI的影响。随着近地轨道卫星数量预计在2030年达到十万量级，评估卫星对SKA观测的实际威胁，并发展有效的消减技术，已成为射电天文领域紧迫的前沿课题。传统的处理方法如数据标记（flagging）会直接丢弃受干扰的数据，造成宝贵观测时间的损失，因此需要更智能的策略。
contribution: 本文基于解析模型，预测了SKA干涉仪在不同频率下受卫星照射的观测时间比例，考虑了两种情景：（1）仅卫星位于主波束内；（2）卫星位于主波束或第一旁瓣内。结果表明，SKA-Low所受影响严重：在约一半频段内，卫星进入波束的时间占比达30%，而在100 MHz以下，该比例升至100%。对SKA-Mid而言，高频段基本不受影响，但1 GHz以下的观测也至少有30%的时间会看到卫星。研究指出，卫星干扰在SKA观测中几乎不可避免，将强烈恶化RFI环境，因此必须系统性地获取卫星RFI的精确测量数据，深入理解其对不同科学目标的影响，并开发比简单标记更少损害数据的新型消减技术。
summary: The Square Kilometre Array (SKA) is expected to start science operations in 2030 and by that time there could be up to 10$^5$ artificial satellites in Earth's orbit, comprising an increase of an order of magnitude compared to 2024. Most of these new satellites will belong to satellite megaconstellations aimed at providing communication services all over Earth. These satellites create radio frequency interference (RFI) that can impact the observations of modern radio telescopes. In this Letter, we forecast the amount of observing time for which the SKA interferometers will be exposed to satellites, risking RFI contamination. We employed an analytical model and considered two cases of exposure to satellites; (1) satellites that only lie in the main beam and (2) satellites that lie in the main beam or the first sidelobe. We show that for SKA-Low, the exposure is high, with satellites in the beam for 30% of the observation time across half of the frequency range, rising up to 100% below 100 MHz. For SKA-Mid, high frequencies are mostly spared, but observations below 1 GHz could also end up seeing satellites for at least 30% of the time. We conclude that satellites will be unavoidable during SKA observing conditions, risking a strong impact on the RFI environment. This will necessitate a concerted effort to obtain accurate measurements of satellite RFI and to improve our understanding of the impact on various science cases. Finally, new mitigation techniques that are less data-destructive than simple flagging must be introduced.

title: WAsp: The Wideband (W) Adaptive-Scale Pixel (Asp) Deconvolution Algorithm for Interferometric Imaging
toc_summary: WAsp: Wideband scale-sensitive deconvolution algorithm
background_knowledge: 在射电干涉测量中，望远镜阵列通过孔径合成（aperture synthesis）技术对天空进行观测，但由于对uv平面的采样不完全，直接傅里叶逆变换得到的“脏图”（dirty image）受到旁瓣效应的影响，需要通过解卷积（deconvolution）算法重建真实的天体亮度分布。CLEAN 系列算法是最常用的解卷积方法，其核心思想是迭代地在图像中找出亮点源并扣除脏束（dirty beam）的响应。随着观测设备灵敏度和带宽的提升，多频率合成（Multi-Frequency Synthesis, MFS）技术得以应用，它同时处理宽频带内的数据，不仅提高信噪比，还能获取频谱信息。然而，传统的 CLEAN 算法（如 Högbom CLEAN）基于点源模型，对展源的重建效果不佳。为此，尺度敏感的（scale-sensitive）解卷积算法（如 MS-Clean）被提出，它们采用不同尺度的基函数（如高斯函数）来表示展源结构，从而更准确地重建多尺度发射。进一步，宽频带观测需要联合空-频建模，即 MS-MFS 算法框架，它在频率维度上引入多项式谱模型，以同时恢复天体的空间结构和频谱指数。但现有的尺度敏感宽频解卷积算法存在已知缺陷，例如在低亮度水平产生显著的宽尺度残差，导致谱指数图出现较大相对误差。
contribution: 本文提出了一种新颖的尺度敏感图像重建算法——宽频带自适应尺度像素解卷积算法（Wideband Asp-Clean，WAsp），专门针对宽频带成像应用优化设计，尤其适用于热噪声限制的孔径合成望远镜观测。该算法在 MS-MFS 框架中用 Asp 算法（Asp-Clean）替代了原有的 MS-Clean，而 Asp-Clean 本身也在成像质量和运行效率上得到了改进。相较现有方法，WAsp 能更好地确保跨频带的残差与噪声模型一致，有效减少 Stokes I 中的宽尺度残差，从而显著提升谱指数图的准确性。此外，WAsp 实现灵活，可配置为支持窄带、宽带的尺度敏感成像、谱立方体成像以及单天线和干涉仪联合成像。通过精心设计的模拟压力测试和实际宽频数据的处理结果，论文展示了该算法相对于现有算法的优越成像性能。
summary:
This paper introduces the Wide-band Asp-Clean (\texttt{WAsp}) algorithm, a novel scale-sensitive image reconstruction method tailored for wide-band imaging applications. This algorithm is particularly beneficial for thermal noise-limited imaging with aperture synthesis telescopes, where joint spatio-frequency modeling of the sky brightness distribution is critical. The \texttt{WAsp} algorithm replaces the use of the MS-Clean algorithm in the MS-MFS algorithm with the {\tt Asp} algorithm \citep{Asp_Clean}, which itself has been improved for both imaging and runtime performance. With the high sensitivity of current and next-generation telescopes, spatio-frequency modeling in a scale-sensitive basis becomes crucial for ensuring that residuals align with the noise model across the frequency band. Although existing wide-band scale-sensitive algorithms have demonstrated superior performance over scale-insensitive counterparts, they often suffer from well-documented deficiencies, leading to significant wide-scale residuals in Stokes-I at low levels and consequently significant relative errors in spectral index maps.
  The \texttt{WAsp} algorithm addresses these limitations while maintaining computational efficiency. The implementation can be configured to support narrow-band and wide-band scale-sensitive imaging, spectral-cube imaging applications and joint single-dish and interferometer imaging. To demonstrate improved imaging performance, we show comparison with existing algorithms via carefully developed simulations for stress-testing the algorithms. We also present results from its application to real-world wide-band data, underscoring its effectiveness in practical imaging scenarios.

title: CosmicDancePro -- Measuring LEO satellite's orbital decay and network connectivity implications during solar storms
toc_summary: LEO satellite resilience in solar storms
background_knowledge: 低地球轨道（Low Earth Orbit, LEO）卫星网络，例如 Starlink，正快速扩张，提供全球通信服务。然而，强烈的太阳风暴会显著增强极紫外（EUV）辐射和粒子沉降，加热地球高层大气，导致热层密度激增。密度升高使卫星遭遇大气阻力加大，引发轨道衰减，甚至可能提前陨落。此外，电离层扰动会引发信号闪烁，造成通信链路不稳定。历史上，2022 年 2 月的地磁暴曾导致 Starlink 损失约 40 颗新发射卫星。为评估这类风险，研究人员结合空间天气监测（如卫星测量的太阳风、地磁指数）、高层大气模型（如 NRLMSISE-00、HASDM）和卫星轨道数据，来量化轨道变化；同时，利用端到端网络测量来观察通信质量的实时波动。理解太阳风暴对 LEO 星座的多层次影响，对于卫星运营策略和网络韧性设计至关重要。
contribution:
论文开发了一款名为 CosmicDancePro 的开源工具，整合真实的多模态数据集（包括多颗卫星的空间天气测量、数据驱动及高保真物理模型的高层大气密度、LEO 卫星轨迹和网络性能测量），以系统评估太阳风暴对 LEO 卫星网络的影响。

核心工作与发现如下：
- 针对 2024 年 5 月超级太阳风暴和另一场近期大风暴，分析了 Starlink 星座的响应。首次揭示了 Starlink 在上述风暴期间采取的特殊编队管理策略，与其常规轨道修正策略有明显差异。
- 发现了驱动 LEO 星座轨道平面间“W”形高度变化模式的物理机制，为先前未解释的现象提供了机理理解。
- 网络层分析量化了风暴期间的连接质量退化：出现反复的短暂中断、重配置延迟尖峰超过 500 ms、上行链路丢包率最高增加 60%、日间延迟模式发生畸变，以及风暴峰值时终端用户数据速率下降超过 10 Mbps。
summary: The May 2024 solar superstorm highlighted the vulnerability of rapidly expanding low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite networks to severe space weather events. To systematically evaluate LEO network resilience, we introduce an open-source tool, CosmicDancePro. It enables a comprehensive analysis of the effects of solar storms in the LEO satellite network. It integrates real-world multimodal datasets, including space weather measurements from several satellites, upper-atmospheric density conditions from data-driven and high-fidelity physics-based models, and LEO satellite trajectory and LEO network measurement traces to quantify orbital decay driven by enhanced atmospheric density and network connectivity degradation. We utilize CosmicDancePro to analyze the Starlink constellation's behavior during two recent major solar storms. First, we identify the specific fleet management strategies Starlink adopts during the May 2024 solar superstorm and how they differ from its regular orbit-correction strategy. Second, we identify the mechanisms driving the previously unexplained 'W'-shaped altitude variation pattern across orbital planes of LEO constellations. Finally, our network-layer analysis quantifies the connectivity degradation during these storms, revealing transient disruptions that include repetitive short-lived outages, reconfiguration latency spikes above 500 ms, up to 60% increase in uplink loss, distorted diurnal latency patterns, and a 10+ Mbps drop in end-user data rates during storm peaks.

title: Simulation-based Inference for Gravitational Waves from Binary Neutron Stars: Application of Summary Data from Heterodyning
toc_summary: Efficient BNS inference with neural posterior estimation
background_knowledge:
双中子星并合产生的引力波信号可持续数分钟，对参数估计构成了巨大挑战。传统方法（如嵌套采样或马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗）需要数百万次的波形计算，每次波形评估成本很高，导致完整的贝叶斯推断非常耗时。为了加速这一过程，近年来兴起了基于模拟的推断（simulation-based inference）方法，其中神经后验估计（neural posterior estimation, NPE）通过直接在模拟数据上训练神经网络来近似后验分布。

NPE 的关键在于对高维输入数据进行有效的降维，即构造低维的摘要统计量（summary statistics）。一个好的摘要统计量应当尽可能保留参数信息，同时大幅降低数据维度，使神经网络能够高效训练和推理。在引力波领域，相对分箱（relative binning）技术通过将频率域数据压缩为少量分箱内的似然信息，已经证明了在似然计算上的巨大加速。该方法基于波形比的多项式近似，利用后牛顿展开的平滑性，仅需在少量频率点上评估波形即可准确计算似然。

将相对分箱的摘要数据与 NPE 结合，有望同时继承前者的计算效率和后者的推理速度，为实时或近实时的双中子星参数估计提供一条可行的技术路径。
contribution:
本文提出了一种新颖的数据压缩策略，将基于相对分箱的似然导向摘要统计量作为 NPE 的输入。具体做法是，从 Zackay 等人（2018）的相对分箱形式出发，直接使用频率域数据经外差（heterodyning）得到的摘要数据，该摘要数据本质上是对波形比的多项式近似，并通过后牛顿理论指导的频率分带（frequency banding）实现。这一压缩方案将原始频域数据转换为仅需 O(1000) 个波形采样点即可评估的量，从而大幅降低了训练和存储成本，优于以往用于双中子星推断的网络。

作者在模拟的双中子星信号上训练了一组 NPE 网络，并利用 1024 次注入数据与传统的嵌套采样方法进行了对比验证。结果显示，网络产生的后验分布在所有考虑的源参数上均得到了良好校准（well-calibrated），对于大多数参数，Jensen-Shannon 散度（JSD）落在数值噪声水平之内。尽管在当前配置下，一致性最差的参数的中位 JSD 超过了 0.01 bits，但整体结果表明该方法有潜力实现双中子星信号的快速参数估计。
summary: Gravitational-wave parameter estimation for binary neutron star (BNS) systems poses severe computational challenges due to the extended signal duration, which can reach several minutes in current detectors. Neural posterior estimation (NPE), a simulation-based inference approach, offers dramatic speedups but requires effective dimensionality reduction of the high-dimensional input data. We present a novel compression strategy based on likelihood-oriented summary statistics derived from the relative binning formalism of Zackay et al. (2018), which compresses raw frequency-domain data into the summary data. The summary data is based on a polynomial approximation of the waveform ratio using frequency banding grounded in post-Newtonian approximation, and directly evaluated with only $O(1000)$ sample points of the waveform. As a result, both the training and storage cost become more efficient than previously reported networks for BNS inference. We train a set of NPE networks on these summary statistics and validate a network against traditional nested sampling over 1024 BNS injections. The network produces well-calibrated posteriors across all source parameters we consider, with Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD) consistent with numerical noise for most parameters. Although we find that the median JSD for the most inconsistent parameter exceeds $10^{-2}$ bits with current configurations, our results show potential for rapid parameter estimation of the BNS signal.

title: Thermal background reduction for mid-infrared imaging by low-rank background and sparse point-source modelling
toc_summary: Low-rank background elimination for mid-IR imaging
background_knowledge: 在中红外 (mid-infrared) 天文学观测中，来自地球大气层和望远镜自身的热背景辐射构成了巨大的噪声来源。这种背景辐射强度极高且时空变化剧烈，往往比待探测的天体信号强数个数量级，给暗弱源的检测与测光带来了严峻挑战。传统的应对策略是斩波 (chopping) 与点头 (nodding) 技术：斩波通过快速摆动望远镜的副镜或主镜，交替观测目标与邻近天区，以获得差分明场图像；点头则进一步移动整个望远镜指向，用于消除斩波过程中残留的不对称热背景。然而，下一代极大口径望远镜 (ELTs) 由于镜面惯性与结构限制，将难以实施经典的斩波-点头操作，迫使天文学家开发不依赖硬件调制的计算型背景扣除方法。近年来，低秩矩阵分解 (low-rank matrix decomposition) 与稀疏表达 (sparse representation) 在信号分离领域展现出了强大潜力。这类方法假设背景具有低秩结构（即由少数几种主要变化模式构成），而待测点源在空间上稀疏分布，从而将背景与源信号分离转化为一个优化问题，为无斩波的红外背景消除提供了新思路。
contribution: 本文提出并评估了一种名为 LORABEL (LOw-RAnk Background ELimination) 的新型计算背景扣除方法，旨在无需传统望远镜点头、源掩膜或额外观测时间开销的前提下，提高中红外天文观测的灵敏度。研究团队将低秩背景削减策略分别应用于：(1) 地面望远镜 VISIR 的仿真注入点源数据，以及 (2) 机载天文台 SOFIA 的实测数据。通过与经典的斩波-点头技术进行系统比较，分析了不同观测场景下对源测光精度与检测信噪比的影响。主要发现包括：在低信噪比 (S/N <5) 的地面 VISIR 数据中，LOABEL 相对于单一斩波差分甚至斩波-点头序列，能降低测光误差的离散度，但代价是引入一定的测光偏差；同时，LOABEL 提升了源检测精度。在 SOFIA 机载数据上，该方法在保留绝大部分源流量的条件下，将平均背景流量相对于传统斩波-点头方法降低了 20–100 倍。这些结果表明，LORABEL 适用于包括地面和机载在内的多种红外观测模式，是一种在暗弱源探测语境中极具潜力的数据后处理工具。
summary: Mid-infrared astronomy from the ground faces critical challenges in accurately detecting and quantifying sources due to the dominant spatially and time-variable background noise. Moreover, chopping and nodding, the traditional methods for dealing with these background issues, will not be technically feasible on the next generation of extremely large telescopes. This limitation requires the development of novel computational methods for a robust background reduction. We present and evaluate a novel method named LOw-RAnk Background ELimination (LORABEL) to improve the sensitivity of mid-infrared astronomical observations, without the need for classical telescope nodding, source masking, or other overheads in observing time. We applied a low-rank background-reduction strategy to (1) data taken on the ground with the VISIR with synthetically injected sources, and (2) airborne data from SOFIA. We compared the performance of our new method to classical chopping and nodding techniques, and analysed the effect on source photometry and detection precision for different observational scenarios. In regimes with a low signal-to-noise ratio (S/N $<5$) in the ground-based VISIR data, LORABEL reduces variation in the photometric error with respect to chopping differences alone and even the classical chop-nod sequence, at the cost of introducing a bias. Secondly, we demonstrate that LORABEL increases detection precision in comparison to traditional background-reduction methods. For the SOFIA dataset, we achieve a $20-100$ fold decrease in mean background flux with respect to the traditional chop-nod method while preserving most of the source flux. Our findings suggest that LORABEL is applicable to a wider range of instrumental observation, that is, both ground-based and airborne, and it is a suitable tool in the context of faint-source detection.

title: The Leiden/ESA Astrophysics Program for Summer Students (LEAPS)
toc_summary: LEAPS: an astrophysics summer research program
background_knowledge: 天体物理学是一门高度全球化的学科，国际学生流动对塑造未来研究职业至关重要。本科生和硕士生在早期阶段接触实际研究、获得导师指导和科学视野，对其学术发展有深远影响。然而，经济条件、信息不对称和地域差异往往成为学生进入国际学术圈的障碍。为应对这些问题，许多机构开设了暑期研究项目，提供全额资助、科研实践和跨文化体验，帮助有潜力的学生跨越门槛，为攻读博士学位和长期科研生涯打下基础。这类项目不仅促进个体成长，也推动着学术界的多样性、包容性和全球合作。
contribution: 本文介绍了莱顿/欧洲空间局天体物理学暑期学生项目（LEAPS）。该项目由莱顿天文台和 ESA 的 ESTEC 中心联合举办，为期 10 周，全额资助本科生和硕士生参与天文研究。自 2013 年启动以来，LEAPS 已接收来自 40 多个国家的 194 名学生。对其中 165 名参与者的追踪数据显示：超过 50% 的人继续攻读博士学位，早期 cohort 中已有成员获得竞争性国际博士后奖学金。参与者共同贡献了至少 25 篇同行评审论文和 13 次国际会议报告。LEAPS 通过提供实践研究、导师指导和科学接触，有效地帮助学生进入了天体物理学研究职业。该项目减轻了经济障碍并促进了多样性，既增强了个体职业轨迹，也推动了包容性学术流动的宏观目标。文章指出，仍需持续努力提升全球代表性，并评估对参与者长期科研生涯的影响。
summary: International student mobility plays a critical role in shaping future research careers, particularly in highly globalized fields such as astrophysics. The Leiden/ESA Astrophysics Program for Summer Students (LEAPS) offers a 10-week, fully funded research program at Leiden Observatory and the European Space Agency's ESTEC centre for undergraduate and master's students. Designed to foster early research involvement, LEAPS supports students from diverse academic and cultural backgrounds. Since its inception in 2013, LEAPS has hosted 194 students from over 40 countries. Data collected for 165 participants reveal that over 50% have progressed to Ph.D. studies, with some members of earlier cohorts already securing competitive international fellowships in astronomy. LEAPS participants have collectively contributed to at least 25 peer-reviewed publications and 13 international conference presentations. LEAPS has contributed successfully in preparing undergraduates for research careers in astrophysics through hands-on experience, mentorship, and scientific exposure. By addressing barriers related to financial means and promoting diversity, the program not only enhances individual career trajectories but also contributes to the broader goal of inclusive academic mobility. Continued efforts are needed to further increase global representation and assess long-term impacts on participants' scientific careers.

title: The science from asteroid sample return missions
toc_summary: Asteroid sample return missions review
background_knowledge: 小行星样本返回任务通过将地外物质直接带回地球，避免了地球环境的污染，为研究太阳系早期演化和生命起源提供了独一无二的证据。自20世纪90年代起，人类已成功执行多次小行星采样任务，其中日本的隼鸟号（Hayabusa）、隼鸟2号（Hayabusa2）和美国的OSIRIS-REx任务分别于2010年、2020年和2023年将来自近地小行星的样本送回地球。这些原始材料记录了行星形成过程中的物理化学条件，包括有机物和水的分布与来源。同时，此类任务有助于深入理解近地小行星的物理特性，从而评估其潜在撞击地球的风险，对行星防御具有重要意义。实验室分析揭示了样本的矿物学、有机化学和同位素特征，为阐明地球水的来源和生命前体分子的星际传递提供了关键线索。
contribution: 本文系统回顾了上述三个里程碑式的小行星采样返回任务的科学收获。文章首先概述了各任务的执行过程与采样的目标天体（丝川、龙宫和贝努）的基本特征。随后，聚焦于初期实验室分析的关键发现，包括样本矿物组成、有机分子多样性和水蚀变证据。这些发现共同指向碳质小行星作为地球水和有机物质潜在来源的假说。论文还探讨了样本研究对于理解太阳系早期动力学过程和评估潜在威胁小行星的价值，强调了采样返回在行星科学与太空安全领域的不可替代作用。
summary: To date, three samples from near-Earth asteroids have been delivered to Earth by Japan's Hayabusa (2010) and Hayabusa2 (2020) missions, and the United States OSIRIS-REx mission (2023). Free from terrestrial contamination, these pristine materials provide new opportunities to investigate planetary formation processes, the delivery of organics and water to the early Earth, and the nature of potentially hazardous asteroids. As analysis of the asteroid samples proceeds in laboratories around the world, we visit each of the missions, review the initial scientific findings, and explore the value of sample return in understanding our origins and protecting our future.

title: FPGA-based Matched Filter Group Optimisation for SKA Pulsar Search Engine
toc_summary: FPGA matched filter optimisation for SKA pulsar search
background_knowledge: 脉冲星搜索是射电天文学的重要课题。由于未知脉冲星的自转周期、色散量（Dispersion Measure）等参数不确定，需要对庞大的参数空间进行穷举搜索。这一过程通常包括两个计算密集阶段：消色散（dedispersion）和脉冲折叠（folding）/频域搜索。匹配滤波器组（matched filter group）是脉冲星搜索流水线的核心模块，实际相当于一组长度各异的大规模 FIR 滤波器，用于对时域信号进行脉冲轮廓的匹配。平方公里阵列（SKA）作为下一代巨型射电望远镜，其中心信号处理器（Central Signal Processor, CSP）需要实时处理海量数据，对算力与能效提出了极高要求。FPGA（现场可编程门阵列）因其并行处理能力和高能效，成为此类信号处理任务的有力候选。在 FPGA 上高效实现可变长滤波器组是一个活跃的工程优化问题，涉及流水线设计、存储带宽利用和模板分配策略。
contribution: 本文面向 SKA 脉冲星搜索引擎，系统研究了匹配滤波器组在 FPGA 上的优化设计。针对时域（TD）实现，提出采用最长处理时间优先（Longest Processing Time first, LPT）规则将不同长度的滤波器模板分配到并行处理流水线，以平衡负载、提升吞吐。对于频域（FD）实现，分析了片外存储容量需求与相对通用设计加速比之间的关系，为设计权衡提供依据。同时，将 FPGA 实现与高端 GPU（NVIDIA Tesla P100）进行对比：中端 Intel Arria 10 FPGA 在绝对速度上虽比 P100 慢 7.5 倍，但其性能功耗比（performance per watt）略优于 GPU。该设计策略亦适用于其他需处理可变长 FIR 滤波器的领域。
summary: Pulsar search is one of the main tasks for the Square Kilometre Array (SKA), implemented in the central signal processor (CSP) sub-element. As most the characteristics of undiscovered pulsars are unknown by definition, exhaustive searches over a multi-dimensional parameter space are employed. One main compute-intensive task of the pulsar search modules in the CPS is the matched filter group, which convolves the input signals with a group of large FIR filters. High-performance designs on FPGAs have been proposed that can process multiple large filters efficiently. But given that in many applications, including the here targeted pulsar search, FIR filters have many different sizes, there is further potential for optimisation. This paper investigates the optimisation of matched filtering designs. While the results are tranferable to other domains, we are motivated by the needs of the SKA pulsar search engine. The influence of changing number of filters and the difference in sizes is analysed. The generic design in time-domain (TD) is optimised by employing the longest processing time (LPT) first rule to distribute filter templates across filter processing pipelines. For the Fourier-domain (FD), the relationship between the required off-chip memory space and speedup over the generic design is investigated. To put the results into relation with with GPU design, we compared with a well-optimised design for top-end GPUs (NVIDIA Tesal P100). While a mid-range Intel Arria 10 is up to 7.5x slower than the P100, the performance per watt is slightly better on the Arria 10.
